name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Instacart and Whole Foods
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
I hope you, your family, your friends, and your community are doing well and staying strong. It's a scary time, so we've got to have each other's backs. I'm thinking about all of the people who are... | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852579c/45c30650/1f729ecd0/66e97463/2607318561/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I hope you, your family, your friends, and your community are doing well and staying strong.

It's a scary time, so we've got to have each other's backs.

I'm thinking about all of the people who are putting themselves at risk to fight this pandemic and do essential work -- including nurses, doctors, other health care professionals, workers at grocery stores, and delivery workers.

And that's why I wanted to email you about something powerfully important that's happening right now -- workers speaking out and fighting for safe, just working conditions.

Today, Instacart grocery-delivery workers are going on strike to demand basic protective gear like hand sanitizer, soap, and disinfectant wipes, along with paid sick leave and hazard pay.

Tomorrow, Whole Foods workers are calling in sick to call for paid sick leave, hazard pay, funds to cover the costs of coronavirus testing and treatment, commonsense safety measures like adequate sanitization at stores and warehouses, and more.

By fighting for their rights as workers, they're fighting for workers and families across the country. By fighting for basic safety, they're helping to stop this crisis.

I support the workers at Instacart and Whole Foods who are in this fight and on the frontlines to keep people fed and at home. And I'll fight alongside all workers who are fighting for basic protections and basic rights. We can't let corporate greed cut people's lives short.

**Workers across the country are fighting a righteous fight. Let 's get in the ring and fight alongside them.

When people are on strike, don't cross the picket line. Shop somewhere else. Shop local. If you can do it safely, offer to pick up groceries for someone who would normally rely on delivery.**

Times like these give us an opportunity to show our character and live our values. We can't all do everything, but we can each do something, and when we take action together, it adds up to a lot.

Here are two quick things you can do right now for the workers at Whole Foods and Instacart:
1. [**Add your name to the Whole Foods workers ' official petition to say you agree with their demands for a safe workplace and paid leave. And share the petition -- over email, social media, everywhere you can -- to get the word out.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852579c/45c30650/1f729ecd0/66e97462/2607318561/VEsE/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.coworker.org/petitions/global-retail-worker-sick-out")

2. [**Read this post from the Instacart Shoppers and Gig Workers Collective about their strike -- and share it everywhere you can, too.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852579c/45c30650/1f729ecd0/66e97465/2607318561/VEsF/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@GigWorkersCollective/instacart-emergency-walk-off-ebdf11b6995a")

It's wrong for Instacart, a multi-billion dollar company, to skimp on providing sanitizer while asking their delivery workers to go in and out of multiple grocery stores a day and touch who-knows-how-many potentially contaminated surfaces.

It's wrong for Whole Foods, owned by Jeff Bezos (a guy worth almost $120 _billion_), to force people to go to work even if they're sick because they can't afford to miss a week's pay. Whole Foods even asked workers to "donate" their paid leave -- which should be a basic right -- to _each other_.

It's appalling, but it's not surprising. It's the kind of exploitation that happens when the rules of our economy encourage people to be greedy.

And that's why we need big, structural change to rewrite the rules and put power in the hands of working people, not just billionaires and massive corporations.

We need an economy that works for everyone -- not just the rich and powerful.

I'm in this fight all the way, and I'm grateful to fight by your side.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852579c/45c30650/1f729ecd0/66e97464/2607318561/VEsC/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852579c/45c30650/1f729ecd0/66e97467/2607318561/VEsD/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852579c/45c30650/1f729ecd0/66e97466/2607318561/VEsA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852579c/45c30650/1f729ecd0/66e97469/2607318561/VEsB/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852579c/45c30650/1f729ecd0/66e97468/2607318561/VEsO/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852579c/45c30650/1f729ecd0/66e9746b/2607318561/VEsP/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")
---|---|---|---|---|---
| Paid for by Warren Democrats
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
We'll miss you, but you can always [unsubscribe](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852579c/45c30650/1f729ecd0/66e9746a/2607318561/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

name: Hickenlooper.com
subject: Once again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:

#
Hello -- Thank you for everything you're doing to power our campaign during this difficult time. So many people have stepped up to give what they can, whether it's $2 or $5 or even $25 to help us flip Colorado's Senate seat blue. We're grateful for your continued support. But to be honest, we're still slightly behind where we need to be before our very first 2020 FEC deadline. So, we're turning to you once again: **Can you get us back on track by adding a donation right now? Our race is heating up _(did you hear that McConnell 's super PAC just booked over $5 million in ads to defend our opponent!)_ and we need all the resources we can muster to build a campaign that can win this election. Please, only donate if you can afford to pitch in at this time:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200330-behind?refcode=em-200330-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Cory Gardner is the _most vulnerable_ Republican Senator in 2020. His approval ratings are plummeting, and the polls show John defeating him in November.
But winning this race won't be easy, folks. Everything could change at a moment's notice -- especially since Gardner is backed by McConnell's network of wealthy right-wing donors.
Time and again, Gardner has proven his allegiance to Washington Republicans and partisan politics over the people of Colorado. So McConnell and his right-wing billionaire friends will spend whatever it takes to keep their favorite yes-man in Congress.
**This race is the best chance Democrats have to flip a seat and take back the majority. Donate $10, or whatever you can (if you can), to help us meet our first FEC deadline tomorrow.**

name: Chris Jacobs
subject: Big News For Small Businesses!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Dear Friend, Since day one of my campaign, supporting small business has been one of my highest priorities. As a small businessman I have been keenly focused on doing everything I can to ensure that small businesses thrive and prosper in Western New York and I truly believe they will be the driver of the comeback of our region. Now in the face of challenges presented by COVID-19, supporting small businesses has become an even more important priority for me. But, I am proud to say that help is on the way for our small business community here in Western New York. On Friday afternoon, President Trump signed into law the CARES Act and that means he is sending massive relief to American small businesses right away. Included in this package is:
* [$350 Billion for 100% federally guaranteed loans for eight weeks of financial assistance for small businesses - loans can be forgiven when used for payroll costs, interest on mortgage obligations, rent, and utilities over an eight week period ](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/fHQ6lQ88xft2DaBUuvwmyw/OtQUO763jg4lIyhj2oBb0BDA)
* $17 Billion for small business debt relief
* Employee retention tax credits up to $10,000 per employee per quarter for employees kept on payroll through 2020
* Expedited capital access for SBA EIDL applicants
* Over $250 Million for Small and Minority Business Development
* To file an application please visit: [https://covid19relief.sba.gov/#/](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/j8N892ms87n4tr0SqjLID892YQ/OtQUO763jg4lIyhj2oBb0BDA)

This is a big win for our small businesses as we weather the effects of COVID-19 and our small business community and employees can rest assured that we will get through this storm together. I have, and will always, prioritize building up our small businesses and this priority will continue when elected to Congress. Stay strong and stay safe. Sincerely, Chris Jacobs
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/jajl7O5gnsGDl5j3Jge90Q/OtQUO763jg4lIyhj2oBb0BDA) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/hfHGMFiNVpVcnCMwH892BeJQ/OtQUO763jg4lIyhj2oBb0BDA)
* * *
5501 Camp Road
P.O. Box 893

clean_body: | Dear Friend, Since day one of my campaign, supporting small business has been one of my highest priorities. As a small businessman I have been keenly focused on doing everything I can to ensure that small businesses thrive and prosper in Western New York and I truly believe they will be the driver of the comeback of our region. Now in the face of challenges presented by COVID-19, supporting small businesses has become an even more important priority for me. But, I am proud to say that help is on the way for our small business community here in Western New York. On Friday afternoon, President Trump signed into law the CARES Act and that means he is sending massive relief to American small businesses right away. Included in this package is: $17 Billion for small business debt relief Employee retention tax credits up to $10,000 per employee per quarter for employees kept on payroll through 2020 Expedited capital access for SBA EIDL applicants Over $250 Million for Small and Minority Business Development To file an application please visit: This is a big win for our small businesses as we weather the effects of COVID-19 and our small business community and employees can rest assured that we will get through this storm together. I have, and will always, prioritize building up our small businesses and this priority will continue when elected to Congress. Stay strong and stay safe. Sincerely, Chris Jacobs * 5501 Camp Road P.O. Box 893 Hamburg, NY 14075-9998 PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: The Hoosier Spirit Has Never Been Stronger.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
In tough times, Hoosiers have always stepped up, and we’re seeing that Hoosier spirit shine now like never before. | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a19cbc01059b4070ac0d53a95272c59c&_e=NyXCgcdmdoCfsk69VLMmeVZdX4ctf6txwrGNhPzF1AcS_z7-gsRq1iSEDdugD72nZkdFktiPYRrQM0V63AS5JxXvlSHlxufBgJbjNBvVnjV35j9iNw1MGhGt5T88Ep65Wab8PBsesQUX7HQjxAXlXrTgZtCueZK-D5dKrpCJ715NJt8mHrWUhBlrz1S-gfYDW6_t9aD-gwijv1kr33j4e0TYVQ7QkqTnkpFV24zYmPgVVOgmzL0Rq4hKvU0QBVgZmdhk_fcVEijAM75Q3qHbpC8PD_W6I-es7WQD4OhcsZFtFixthC1WWrSXP5zjfhIcYoUrpI_NLhwofohpQfEsFiLn8H60esizg9Dc5cFHIc4fr26_ZaERCZ3C4JBdTIPepEXqMGmOIsYW0CfU8ss_Atp7CcURdpW-DQm_ghMqflc%3D) |
---|---|---
Friend,

_“I don’t know if the Hoosier spirit has ever been stronger.”_

In tough times, Hoosiers have always stepped up, and we’re seeing that Hoosier spirit shine now like never before.

Governor Holcomb signed an executive order today that allows for retired medical professionals and medical students to join the front lines. In the short time since that call for trained medical volunteers was made,**over 5,300 Hoosiers have answered!**

A fitting reminder of the importance of our medical professionals as we celebrate**National Doctors Day.**

Additionally, Governor Holcomb announced today that his executive order:
* Removes regulatory barriers to allow for better preparation for a surge in positive COVID-19 cases.
* Further clarifies elective, non-urgent surgical procedures.
* Gives the State Health Commissioner the authority to open temporary hospitals, if needed.

Governor Holcomb also sent a letter to President Trump officially requesting a disaster declaration for Indiana so every tool and resource of the federal government will be available to assist in Indiana’s recovery efforts.

We also heard from members of Governor Holcomb’s task force who updated us on Indiana’s preparedness for the expected surge in coronavirus cases.
* Indiana is testing 10 times as many Hoosiers as we were just a few weeks ago.
* Hospitals have a baseline of 1,432 ICU beds, today the capacity has increased to 1,940 (a 35% increase), with more coming online daily. Goal is to double ICU space.
* The baseline number of ventilators is 1,777 with the goal to double that as well.
* Hospitals are opening more space by ending elective procedures, consolidating operations between hospitals, reopening recently-closed buildings and reusing space within each unit.

[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a19cbc01059b4070ac0d53a95272c59c&_e=NyXCgcdmdoCfsk69VLMmeVZdX4ctf6txwrGNhPzF1AcS_z7-gsRq1iSEDdugD72nZkdFktiPYRrQM0V63AS5JxXvlSHlxufBgJbjNBvVnjV35j9iNw1MGhGt5T88Ep65Wab8PBsesQUX7HQjxAXlXrTgZtCueZK-D5dKrpCJ715NJt8mHrWUhBlrz1S-gfYDW6_t9aD-gwijv1kr33j4e-tr-a1VWSvQVCpHsETe3izpk9K90GYIQHSJhqAjJdECrSnaXKFF2OQC-YS3iPkd2d10rvTyM3P-t75wTIH8bysUtKsbW18vIRYevduf6PU6TJN_FrCvhFXApRQr93av881yliT_Rop6h2_BYNzrtC6eN0yTkYSK7T8aY0jEnJVrAaXyyLX2zQ3D4QeT0tSbUZE88ttSXWPx0cXLrColbKQ%3D)
[ **Watch Indiana's Surge Plan** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a19cbc01059b4070ac0d53a95272c59c&_e=NyXCgcdmdoCfsk69VLMmeVZdX4ctf6txwrGNhPzF1AcS_z7-gsRq1iSEDdugD72nZkdFktiPYRrQM0V63AS5JxXvlSHlxufBgJbjNBvVnjV35j9iNw1MGhGt5T88Ep65Wab8PBsesQUX7HQjxAXlXrTgZtCueZK-D5dKrpCJ715NJt8mHrWUhBlrz1S-gfYDW6_t9aD-gwijv1kr33j4e574YnAIqZXEOVUyONM98yxePqnwvuRvLavoUtTlIGC0z7wWb5cdng8V3ti5ePgawH800vDsqCvTTzWccXBbJaAi7VEcqGx6dFXbRF6opyoKZ0o-Dqm1QZkB1E5YK0kaAZJrJ7dEZ7Q-0O8NEogIE0Vv-VJYm4j663ZmSU498jsYrBD7RgX0Q8LW8mWeGEDSasSLgO4wmPQGwR3KDtJx0wc%3D)
Thank you to everyone who is doing your part to stop the spread of this uber-contagious virus...just by hunkering down, you’re making a huge difference. It's literally saving lives.

Today may be **National Doctors Day,** but if there ever was a “year of the caregiver,” this is certainly it. We hope you can take a moment with a text, a call, or even a post on social media to thank our Hoosier doctors—and all the health care professionals fighting this pandemic—for everything they’re doing to get us through this.

And we will get through this.

Stay safe and healthy!

-Your Holcomb Crew

---

name: Brandon, Team Christy
subject: March recap >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | _The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

Looking back on this race, I never would have thought this is where we would end up, Peter.

The shape of this race has changed entirely over the month of March. We started with our primary, where we found out we'd be running against Trump-pawn Mike Garcia on May 12th.

Then, our country started going through a crisis we were thoroughly unprepared for. And it's dramatically changed the dynamic of how we are running for this seat.

Now we're less than 7 weeks away from a special election that will be the first referendum on the leadership of our country during this crisis.

**[We had to double our end-of-quarter goal to make sure we're ready for the campaign ahead. We're still $17,895 short -- can you pitch in before midnight tomorrow?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e0/29776869/a151f9d/569fbe14/46886576/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMzBfZW9xNC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200330_eoq4-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e0/29776869/a151f9d/569fbe15/46886576/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMzBfZW9xNC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200330_eoq4-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e0/29776869/a151f9d/569fbe16/46886576/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMzBfZW9xNC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200330_eoq4-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e0/29776869/a151f9d/569fbe17/46886576/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMzBfZW9xNC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200330_eoq4-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e0/29776869/a151f9d/569fbe10/46886576/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMzBfZW9xNC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200330_eoq4-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e0/29776869/a151f9d/569fbe11/46886576/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMzBfZW9xNC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200330_eoq4-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e0/29776869/a151f9d/569fbe14/46886576/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMzBfZW9xNC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200330_eoq4-full")
This special election is going to send a message around the country about what type of leadership Americans want to see during times of crisis.

**Do they want someone who carries on partisan political attacks, who said "everyone should figure out how to fend for themselves," who said he would support the President (who has undermined the severity of this crisis time and again) 100% of the time?**

Or a proven leader -- someone who can reach across the aisle and will look out for others in good times and bad?

**[We know our representative has to be Christy -- chip in $5 or whatever you can before midnight tomorrow to make it happen.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8e0/29776869/a151f9d/569fbe14/46886576/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDAzMzBfZW9xNC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2003_email_christysmith_eoq?refcode=em20_200330_eoq4-full")**

Thanks so much. We are so lucky to have you on our team.

\-- Brandon

Brandon Zavala
Campaign manager

Or a proven leader -- someone who can reach across the aisle and will look out for others in good times and bad? "" Thanks so much. We are so lucky to have you on our team. \-- Brandon Brandon Zavala Campaign manager | | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress. ---|--- |

Dear Peter,
I'm Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.

**The last couple of weeks clearly shows the danger to the nation if Pelosi stays Speaker. She will tank the country, tank our economy, if she thinks it will help her anti-American agenda!**

The deadline is tomorrow! **I needed to raise $50,000 to keep pace with my radical Dem opponent. I have only $4,660 to go but only one day left!**

[If you have not yet given, or you gave previously, will you give right now? I ask you to contribute $5, $10, $15 or match what you did before or double what you did before.](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=iI2jFhRWMpNxmng&b=dd8dCkciH600wpUQ76rBQg)

name: Steve Chabot
subject: COVID-19 Update
body:
The last few weeks have seen events unprecedented in the history of our country and I am want you to know I am fighting tirelessly, working across par
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhhiijtt-kujkulhluu-k/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhiijtt-kujkulhluu-r/) Friends,The last few weeks have seen events unprecedented in the history of our country and I want you to know I am fighting tirelessly, working across party lines and with Governor DeWine, to help our communities get through the coronavirus crisis.As the Republican leader on the House Committee on Small Business, I have been especially focused on securing the support our Ohio small businesses need to weather this storm and emerge stronger on the other side.Below is an update on my work to support our small businesses, our health care system, and hardworking Ohio families through these challenging times. While times are tough, I am hearted by the outpouring of support from across our communities and the resilience Ohio has demonstrated. Check below for new resources that are available to you.I worked across party lines to pass the bipartisan **Families First Coronavirus Act**. The act provides $1.2 billion to help cover the costs of coronavirus testing, $1.25 billion for emergency nutritional assistance for seniors, children, and low-income individuals, and $15 million in tax credits to help small businesses.Members from both parties also came together to pass the** Coronavirus Preparedness and Response Supplemental Appropriations Act** to provide $7.8 billion in emergency appropriations for equipment for health officials and $1 billion for the CDC's state and local response efforts.Finally, as you have probably seen on the news, Congress unanimously passed an economic stimulus package that provides direct relief for families, small businesses, and industries affected by COVID-19. The stimulus package includes:* Direct payments of $1,200 for individuals earning less than $75,000 annually, $1,200 for heads of household earning less than $112,500, $2,400 for couples earning less than $150,000, and an additional $500 per child* Expanded access for small business loans up to $10 million, on top of loans up to $2 million already offered by the Small Business Administration last week.* Suspension of payments for all federally held student loans. **Coronavirus Resources** The most in-depth and reliable resource for information on COVID-19 can be found at [coronavirus.gov.](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhiijtt-kujkulhluu-y/) This CDC site has updated information, links on how to help and what to do if you think you may be sick, and a wealth of helpful information.And of course, constituents should feel free to contact my office anytime with questions or concerns. **Donate Blood to the Red Cross** There are numerous opportunities to help out during the COVID-19 epidemic. Currently there is an urgent need for blood donors. To find out where or how to become a donor the [Greater Cincinnati Red Cross](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhiijtt-kujkulhluu-j/) has a helpful how-to guide. Even if you cannot give blood you can donate or spread awareness by posting the information on your social media page. **Providing Relief for Small Businesses** This month, the Small Business Association took decisive action to combat the economic consequences of the COVID-19 epidemic by creating a new category of loans specifically for the current crisis. We must protect our small businesses in Ohio and ensure they are able to weather the temporary storm. Learn more [here:](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhiijtt-kujkulhluu-t/) **Important Election Update** The Ohio legislature has determined new plans for the primary election. Votes will be cast by mail and absentee ballot voting has been extended to April 28th. Ballots must be completed and postmarked by April 27th. You can request an absentee ballot by visiting the Ohio Secretary of State's [website](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhiijtt-kujkulhluu-i/). **Get Involved With Team Chabot** The current situation has not slowed down our team and does not mean there aren't ways to get involved while staying safe at home.Are you a potential campaign volunteer interested in making calls from home to voters in our community?Or a motivated high school or college student looking for an opportunity to make an impact and build your resume while working remotely with a campaign internship?If so, please contact [jfindlay@chabtoforcongress.com](mailto:jfindlay@chabtoforcongress.com). | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhiijtt-kujkulhluu-d/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhiijtt-kujkulhluu-h/)
---|---
6613 Glenway Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.
[ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-jhhiijtt-kujkulhluu-u/)
[ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-jhhiijtt-kujkulhluu-o/)
[ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-jhhiijtt-l-b)
[Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jhhiijtt-961825B2-kujkulhluu-n) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jhhiijtt-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 3/30
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
[](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhhige-olhhkyhhid-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| As we enter another week of this pandemic, it's easy to be bogged down by all the negativity surrounding this disease. During these past couple weeks, I've seen incredible resliance from Tennesseans. I've been hearing stories about folks lifting one another up, taking care of one another, and taking steps to ensure that this virus doesn't continue to spread. On National Doctor's Day, I want to especially thank my colleagues who are on the front lines of this pandemic. These brave men and women are putting their own health on the line to fight COVID-19 and are working day and night ensure this doesn't take any more lives. Continue to pray for them and today take the time to thank a doctor or nurse in your life! I hope you've been tuning in to our virtual town halls on our Facebook page for the past couple weeks. We did one last Tuesday and one last Thursday. [You can watch them both here!](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhhige-olhhkyhhid-j/) I will be back on Facebook Live for more virtual town halls [Tuesday, March 31](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhhige-olhhkyhhid-t/), [Thursday, April 2,](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhhige-olhhkyhhid-i/) and [Saturday, April 4](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhhige-olhhkyhhid-d/). [Clink the link here to submit your questions!](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhhige-olhhkyhhid-h/) I know many of you are worried about this virus and the impact it will have on your health, your loved ones, and the economy. While these are tumultuous times, there is no need to panic. Continue to practice social distancing, wash your hands, and enjoy time with your family. I know many of you have questions or are worried. Please feel free to email me directly at manny@drmannyforsenate.com if I can help in any way. **COVID-19 Resources:** There are many resources at your disposal. I urge you to order take-out, donate blood, and above all pray for our country during this time. Also please adhere to the guidelines being put forth by President Trump, Governor Lee, and the[ CDC](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhhige-olhhkyhhid-k/). And, if you know of others doing great work across our state, send them our way so we can highlight them! One of the most important things any of us can do is to go give blood! There are also many non-profits and charities doing great work during this time. Please consider donating to Matthew 25 Ministries or Feeding America [Matthew 25 Ministries](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhhige-olhhkyhhid-u/) [FEeding America](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhhige-olhhkyhhid-o/) Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhhige-olhhkyhhid-b/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhhige-olhhkyhhid-n/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhhige-olhhkyhhid-p/) to keep up with all that we are doing during this pandemic. We aren't slowing this campaign down as we work towards victory in August! Stay safe out there. I'm praying for all of us! Dr. Manny P.S. I know you don't want to be hearing from politicians right now. That is one reason we need to send political outsiders to Washington. Our first quarter ends tomorrow and we really need your help! Please consider donating to our campaign to send me to Washington to represent you in the US Senate! [DoNATe herE](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhhige-olhhkyhhid-x/) Copyright © 2019 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |

name: Rick Kennedy
subject: There's That Word Again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
Investment

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16713880/177849745/-1907457918?refcode=03292020_em_hdr&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjJmNmNhYS01MDczLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-aCQbSRXS_7G_yZhqjEPsE6YlpOkg9Xqp7STdRNhvxM=)
---
Dear Friend, In an interview published today on NPR, Dr. Robert Redfield, Director of the CDC said, "I don't think anybody would disagree that for decades, collectively, our nation's under-invested in public health." There's that word again - investment. Much of what the federal government does, or should do, is make investments in areas like public health, education, infrastructure, or health care. These are investments that the private sector doesn't make, because they don't provide a direct return to shareholders, they provide a return to society. They're investments in the future of our people and of our nation. Unfortunately, they're also easy targets for ideological attack from people like Pete Sessions, the Republican front-runner for this seat. Mr. Sessions served in Congress for over 20 years. His rating from the American Public Health Association was 0%. In times of crisis we expect leadership from the executive branch. But it is Congress that must have the foresight and political courage to make the investments in the institutions and tools the President has available to respond. As your congressman, that would be my job. I'm not going to be flashy about it. I'm not going to provide a lot of entertainment. I'm not going to wear a gasmask on the house floor because I know it will get me on TV. I'm simply going to get the job done. clean_body: Investment | = Dear Friend, In an interview published today on NPR, Dr. Robert Redfield, Director of the CDC said, "I don't think anybody would disagree that for decades, collectively, our nation's under-invested in public health." There's that word again - investment. Much of what the federal government does, or should do, is make investments in areas like public health, education, infrastructure, or health care. These are investments that the private sector doesn't make, because they don't provide a direct return to shareholders, they provide a return to society. They're investments in the future of our people and of our nation. Unfortunately, they're also easy targets for ideological attack from people like Pete Sessions, the Republican front-runner for this seat. Mr. Sessions served in Congress for over 20 years. His rating from the American Public Health Association was 0%. In times of crisis we expect leadership from the executive branch. But it is Congress that must have the foresight and political courage to make the investments in the institutions and tools the President has available to respond. As your congressman, that would be my job. I'm not going to be flashy about it. I'm not going to provide a lot of entertainment. I'm not going to wear a gasmask on the house floor because I know it will get me on TV. I'm simply going to get the job done. I need your help to get there. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Stay safe, and stay home. Rick | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

name: Brett Anders
subject: RE: A politician vs. a representative
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
I wanted to make sure you saw Josh’s email yesterday, team.

Josh is the kind of leader we need in Washington right now. He’s not a member of fancy country clubs or a part of Mitch McConnell’s dark money operation. He grew up in Fleming County, has served as a Marine and a police officer, and he knows what it’s like to struggle to get by.

Can you chip in before midnight tonight to help us meet our online fundraising goal?

Our team is working harder than ever to make this our best fundraising quarter yet, and to do Josh proud. We have just a few hours to go until our deadline — chip in if you can here.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-mar-eoq?refcode=HIC_20200331am_eoq5_em_fr_all_l1]

— Brett Anders

Campaign Manager

________________________________________________________________________

From: Josh Hicks
Date: March 30, 2020
Re: A politician vs. a representative

I wanted to make sure you saw Josh’s email yesterday, team.

Josh is the kind of leader we need in Washington right now. He’s not a member of fancy country clubs or a part of Mitch McConnell’s dark-money operation. He grew up in Fleming County, has served as a Marine and a police officer, and he knows what it’s like to struggle to get by.

Can you chip in before midnight tonight to help us meet our online fundraising goal?

Our team is working harder than ever to make this our best fundraising quarter yet, and to do Josh proud. We have just a few hours to go until our deadline — chip in if you can here.

— Brett Anders
Campaign Manager

---------- Forwarded message ----------

From: Josh Hicks
Date: March 30, 2020
Re: A politician vs. a representative

Friends,

These are tough times for all of us.

There’s one thing this crisis has made clear: the difference between a politician and a representative. It’s the difference between someone who will do anything and say anything to get elected and a leader who works for their district.

When a politician goes to Washington, they think “What are the things I can do to help my reelection chances? How can I cloak myself in power?”

When a representative goes to Washington, they think “What are the things that will do the most good, and help my people the most?”

My promise to you? I’m not a politician. I’m running to be the next representative for Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District.

And, right now, I could use your help. Our end of quarter fundraising deadline is tomorrow night at midnight and I’m counting on grassroots donors to help us reach our goal.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-mar-eoq?refcode=HIC_20200331am_eoq5_em_fr_all_l2]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-mar-eoq?refcode=HIC_20200331am_eoq5_em_fr_all_btn1]

From day one, my campaign has been about what it would really mean to bring representation to this district. To me, the best way to do that is to refuse corporate PAC or special interest money. I won’t take a single penny of their money.

I want to see structural change in Washington. Regular people — not whoever’s going to cut your next six-figure campaign check — should be front and center of every bill, every debate, and every vote a member of Congress takes.

I understand you might not be able to give right now. But if you’re able, make a donation now and we can send a message to the politicians in Washington that Kentucky’s 6th District is ready for a real representative.

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-mar-eoq?refcode=HIC_20200331am_eoq5_em_fr_all_l3]

Thank you,

Josh

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-mar-eoq?refcode=HIC_20200331am_eoq5_em_fr_all_btn2]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-mar-eoq?refcode=HIC_20200331am_eoq5_em_fr_all_ftr1]
Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
Josh Hicks for Congress
PO Box 1214
Lexington, KY 40588
United States
Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney.
He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. Please consider making a $5 contribution to Josh’s campaign today.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-mar-eoq?refcode=HIC_20200331am_eoq5_em_fr_all_ftr2]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-mar-eoq?refcode=HIC_20200331am_eoq5_em_fr_all_ftr3]

| | Friends,

I promise this is one of the _**last emails you’ll get from me**_**for a while** _****_ asking for help for the Campaign . . .
**But our deadline is only hours away.**
The world is a bit upside down right now, I know, but the race for Congress goes on; I have a primary on June 9th. If you're able help me, this quarter ends at _**midnight tonight.**_

The democrat I will face in November is raising buckets of special interest dollars -- millions of them.

And I have _**only a few hours left**_ to **hear from YOU** if you can.

I understand during this time some may not be able to do what they normally would.

But if you’re able to help, please do today:

disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
There’s still work to do, and I’m determined to see it through. Now more than ever.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16717116/177880165/464986751?refcode=em_fr_2020.03.31_b1_ed_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjM3OTUyNy01YjczLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QbXHTmVENNd6shIoRfQAWiu-Yaq5mSJkZ8-wAsZ6gO8=) _We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. **I’m running for Congress to build a future where every American family can succeed.** That means we have to ensure access to affordable health care, tackle climate change, lower prescription drug costs, and protect critical programs like Medicare and Social Security.

**To put it simply: There’s still work to do, and I’m determined to see it through.**_Now more than ever._

name: Serve America
subject: We need new leaders—support them today
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16718218/177890575/-631061264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjIzZjUwNS01ZjczLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c8CPXr_JwA26_8JyYO3waAt3uC-lAO9LNM5rDks0SSw=&emci=f52e4809-5773-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=cb23f505-5f73-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=194769) Friend, It’s been several weeks since many of us started working from home. Businesses are closed, at least for the foreseeable future, and unemployment numbers are at historical highs. Every state in our nation has been impacted by this crisis. This is one of those moments in our country’s history that require all hands on deck. Here’s the good news: We will get through this. And as we do, we see everyday heroes stepping up to help their fellow citizens in their time of need. **One thing this crisis has made crystal clear is that we need better leaders in Washington.** It’s unacceptable that Republicans in the House and Senate lied for weeks about the seriousness of the looming crisis. They dragged their feet in getting help to Americans and prioritized relief efforts for giant and otherwise profitable corporations that chose to waste their cash flow on stock buybacks and CEO compensation instead of saving a rainy day fund. And the GOP continues to defend President Trump’s abysmal response to this crisis that is literally costing lives every day. We know it’s hard to focus on elections right now, but our work is more important than ever. Politics is personal; elections are the way we get better leaders who will stand up for you in Washington. clean_body: | | | Friend, It’s been several weeks since many of us started working from home. Businesses are closed, at least for the foreseeable future, and unemployment numbers are at historical highs. Every state in our nation has been impacted by this crisis. This is one of those moments in our country’s history that require all hands on deck. Here’s the good news: We will get through this. And as we do, we see everyday heroes stepping up to help their fellow citizens in their time of need. One thing this crisis has made crystal clear is that we need better leaders in Washington. It’s unacceptable that Republicans in the House and Senate lied for weeks about the seriousness of the looming crisis. They dragged their feet in getting help to Americans and prioritized relief efforts for giant and otherwise profitable corporations that chose to waste their cash flow on stock buybacks and CEO compensation instead of saving a rainy day fund. And the GOP continues to defend President Trump’s abysmal response to this crisis that is literally costing lives every day. We know it’s hard to focus on elections right now, but our work is more important than ever. Politics is personal; elections are the way we get better leaders who will stand up for you in Washington. That’s why we are working around the clock to help our bring change to Congress, but we still need your help. = We have a goal of raising $10,000 today. We can’t reach that goal without you. We hope you’re taking care of yourself. Please let us know if there’s anything we can do to help you in this time. Serve America = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Serve America PAC, Friends for Zahra Karinshak, Josh Hicks for Congress, Friends of Dan Feehan, Jackie Gordon for Congress, Nikki Foster for OH, Gina Ortiz Jones for Congress, Kim for Congress, Kahele for Congress, Brynne Kennedy for Congress, McDermott for Congress, Stephanie for New Jersey, and Sri for Congress. name: Charles Booker
subject: Can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
I’m reaching out personally to ask for your help in this fight. I know you’re just as hungry as I am to defeat Mitch and to end the dysfunction we’re witnessing in our Senate.
#
I know you’re just as hungry as I am to defeat Mitch and to end the dysfunction we’re witnessing in our Senate.
**That’s why I’m reaching out personally to ask for your help in this fight. **
Our FEC deadline is **tonight at midnight** and we’re just a handful of donations away from hitting our $20,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal.
**[It’s critical we hit this goal if we want to pull off a grassroots victory this November. Please chip in $5 or anything you can afford — your donation can be the one that pushes us over the edge.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16718390/177891475/1360822284?refcode=em20200331&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDYyZDcwYS02MDczLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LzCN3h9f0e7v2wsJDIgMMW3pEuCK4_R144O1hEHdhlo=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16718391/177891476/1360822284?refcode=em20200331&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDYyZDcwYS02MDczLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LzCN3h9f0e7v2wsJDIgMMW3pEuCK4_R144O1hEHdhlo=)****
I can’t emphasize enough how huge it would be for our progressive movement if we hit this goal.
**It’s so much more than reaching a number. When you give $5 to our campaign it’s a powerful way of saying that you:**
_Stand with our fight_ to pass Medicare for All, to make sure every family has a fair shot at the American Dream, and to enact a climate crisis response before it’s too late for our planet.
_Reject the corporate influence_ that’s dominated our politics for too long.
_And believe that we the people deserve much more than what we’re getting from Mitch. _
**[Our opponents, the media, and the establishment will be watching whether we hit our goal. I’m hopeful that we’ll show them that this movement is ready to fight. Can I count on you to pitch in before the deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16718392/177891477/1360822284?refcode=em20200331&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDYyZDcwYS02MDczLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LzCN3h9f0e7v2wsJDIgMMW3pEuCK4_R144O1hEHdhlo=)**
I hate to be blunt, but also want to remind you how consequential it would be if we fall short tonight.
If we don’t reach our goal, it would be a huge blow to all of the progress we’ve made. **So please — if there’s anytime you should donate to our campaign it should be tonight. **
I’ll check in again with you later,
Charles
_P.S. Our hearts go out to anyone struggling right now to make ends meet. Please take care of yourself — we only ask you to donate if you can afford to. Your support already means a lot to us._

** **

****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16718393/177891478/1360822284?refcode=em20200331-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDYyZDcwYS02MDczLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LzCN3h9f0e7v2wsJDIgMMW3pEuCK4_R144O1hEHdhlo=)****
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16718394/177891479/-640535987?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDYyZDcwYS02MDczLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LzCN3h9f0e7v2wsJDIgMMW3pEuCK4_R144O1hEHdhlo=&emci=2090a301-5d73-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=cd62d70a-6073-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16718395/177891480/-778353598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDYyZDcwYS02MDczLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LzCN3h9f0e7v2wsJDIgMMW3pEuCK4_R144O1hEHdhlo=&emci=2090a301-5d73-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=cd62d70a-6073-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16718396/177891481/-1403296926?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDYyZDcwYS02MDczLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LzCN3h9f0e7v2wsJDIgMMW3pEuCK4_R144O1hEHdhlo=&emci=2090a301-5d73-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=cd62d70a-6073-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)

name: Emily Cupples
subject: things are different
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
We need your help right now. With all that has been going on, our fundraising numbers aren’t where they need to be. We have to raise $6,734 to meet our March goal and we only have until midnight tonight.
Social distancing is changing the way we have to do things. Fundraising events for now aren’t possible, which means we really have to rely on online donations like never before. We’re doing absolutely everything we can to support and elect Democrats, but we need your help. Will you make a donation right now if you can, and help us reach our goal? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
I've attached Mary's note from yesterday just in case you missed it. She discusses in greater detail how we are making changes to stay ahead of the curve throughout this crisis. Everyone stay safe and wash your hands!
Thank you,
Emily Cupples
Communications Director, Tennessee Democratic Party
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mary Mancini <mary@tndp.org>
Date: Mon, Mar 30, 2020 at 1:33 PM
How are you holding up? We hope you and your loved ones are taking care of each other during these extraordinary times and getting the support you need.
At the Tennessee Democratic Party, we are working from home, adjusting to this new normal, and staying ahead of the curve. There’s so much work to be done and we are lucky to have such a dedicated team. We’re also lucky and grateful to have such strong support from Tennessee Democrats like you.
As we shift our organizing efforts to digital over the next few weeks and months, we have already started to invest in infrastructure to meet growing needs.
For example:
*
Our
Political
Director,
Evan
Latt,
is
sharing
digital
campaign
training
resources
with
our
candidates.
*
Maria
Brewer,
our
Party
Affairs
Director,
came
up
with
a
process
for
holding
virtual
delegate
selection
conventions
that
is
a
model
for
other
state
Democratic
Parties
facing
the
same
task.
*
In
the
field,
we
are
training
our
county
parties
in
online
meetings
and
organizing,
and
offering
our
candidates
online
campaign
trainings.
*
Every
Thursday,
through
Facebook
Live,
I'll
be
sitting
down
with
candidates
on
the
2020
ballot
to
discuss
campaign
priorities
and
also
give
viewers
a
chance
to
ask
candidates
questions
about
their
platform.
The 2020 election cycle is going to be different. We’ve accepted that. Digital organizing is going to be more crucial than ever during this crisis. That’s why we are getting ahead by ramping up our digital efforts now – connecting with our candidates, volunteers, and voters.
A crucial part of that effort is fundraising. Tomorrow is the end of the quarter and we are behind. We need to raise $8,670 to meet our goal and we need your help. Will you make a contribution right now, if you can, and help us cross the finish line? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Thank you,
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

Unfortunately, our finances are not where we had hoped. But before I ask you to make a contribution that will get us closer to our projected target, I want to explain why this deadline matters so much. This campaign is powered by the people: grassroots supporters from around the 16th District, Florida, and the country who want to send bold, new leadership to Washington. **We are up against someone who has money in the bank, a reserve of wealthy donors, and the means to self fund. The scales are tipped in our opponent’s favor, and it’s up to us to show that hard work and grassroots contributions are actually the winning formula.** [**With the scales tipped in favor of Margaret’s opponent, it’s up to us to tip them back in our favor. It’s as important as ever that we make sure she has the resources to fight back and stay competitive. name: Greg Stanton
subject: Working for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
During this current public health crisis, I have gone to work for you to make sure Arizona families have the resources and care they need to persevere through the coronavirus pandemic.

I have put politics aside to work with ALL my colleagues in Congress, regardless of party, to pass the bipartisan _CARES Act_ , which will put money back into the pockets of working Americans, support small businesses and critical industries, and provide the necessary public health infrastructure that our state desperately needs to deliver care during this crisis.

**I know these are uncertain times for all of us. I pledge to do everything I can in Congress to put Arizona first by passing meaningful legislation that protects our healthcare and keeps our economy resilient during these difficult times. **

That's why, out of a desire to keep others safe and focus on my work for Arizona, I have cancelled fundraisers and events for my campaign to devote my full focus at this time to helping Arizona get through this crisis.

However, without these fundraisers and events, my campaign is not going to reach our fundraising goals this quarter. That's why we are relying on you _more than ever before_ to help us at least keep pace ahead of tonight's CRITICAL first quarter fundraising deadline.

[**We need your help to keep our campaign going -- Will you make a contribution before tonight's MIDNIGHT DEADLINE?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9XBZGBwyuxXOI5lrcUerjPgbwAw286uNc7bwkoDeVW4=/2c8grKiBZk098SgZiq30KNoRZKOzDQivF4OTbDm72hQ=?refcode=X_033020_EOQ_A&amount=25&recurring=auto)

name: Dean Browning
subject: Will You Help Me?
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
I hope you and your family are doing well and staying safe and healthy. Tonight, at midnight, we close the books on the first quarter of 2020.
We are a little short of our goal for the quarter. Will you contribute today to help our campaign reach its goal?
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sJ7CAHSoZdEL9pRsR0N_hKAtkDT0ltfTEItuE3BHj64Vkc9Ah45tDoCMz7A3WnzrBLylSPnH9ZOEVkzVVatmM0lkKB-lLAAbqa09A5l4eRykRvjsgPTsSSMykY8pe-ggszcbt4-N-cCfBIcwKcotTWgZQK4LtvLC6__Ohx1K9mn_uQeqARqWag==&c=pJUmexbFkv30cGmFe-4-f4Sed95vk-JuHi0uDc7Q0l5omZ5n-f-T-A==&ch=dtcN4rJs8cvddApGs31uCiJtVkF4p8vZRMrmhfeVF_dDvL3Few_ycg==)
---
| I know this is a difficult time for many.
We have changed the way we operate our business, schools, and life due to COVID-19.
We have also changed the way we campaign, conducting it now through online posts and phone calls.
We are doing our best to keep the energy and momentum up around the campaign even in uncertain times.
But we need your help to accomplish our goals.
Can I count on you for your most generous donation today?
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sJ7CAHSoZdEL9pRsR0N_hKAtkDT0ltfTEItuE3BHj64Vkc9Ah45tDoCMz7A3WnzrBLylSPnH9ZOEVkzVVatmM0lkKB-lLAAbqa09A5l4eRykRvjsgPTsSSMykY8pe-ggszcbt4-N-cCfBIcwKcotTWgZQK4LtvLC6__Ohx1K9mn_uQeqARqWag==&c=pJUmexbFkv30cGmFe-4-f4Sed95vk-JuHi0uDc7Q0l5omZ5n-f-T-A==&ch=dtcN4rJs8cvddApGs31uCiJtVkF4p8vZRMrmhfeVF_dDvL3Few_ycg==)
---
| I am running for Congress to bring back our voice to the district.
I will represent our principles and convictions in the nation's capital. I will always listen to you and bring your hopes, dreams, and concerns with me to Washington.
Please consider donating what you can to help our campaign so we may have clear and transparent representation in D.C.
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sJ7CAHSoZdEL9pRsR0N_hKAtkDT0ltfTEItuE3BHj64Vkc9Ah45tDoCMz7A3WnzrBLylSPnH9ZOEVkzVVatmM0lkKB-lLAAbqa09A5l4eRykRvjsgPTsSSMykY8pe-ggszcbt4-N-cCfBIcwKcotTWgZQK4LtvLC6__Ohx1K9mn_uQeqARqWag==&c=pJUmexbFkv30cGmFe-4-f4Sed95vk-JuHi0uDc7Q0l5omZ5n-f-T-A==&ch=dtcN4rJs8cvddApGs31uCiJtVkF4p8vZRMrmhfeVF_dDvL3Few_ycg==)
---
| Please stay healthy and safe.
For Freedom,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Republican for Congress, PA-07
P.S. Our campaign operates off of donations from grassroots activists like you!
Can I count on you to help us meet our fundraising goal by donating now?

Friend, Terry wanted us to reach out to you today and remind you our first fundraising quarter ends tonight at midnight! While we have accomplished so much together these past months, we cannot afford to grow complacent and take a break. Our finance report this morning shows we still need 55 donors to chip in $20.20 each if we're going to stay on pace to defeat Kendra Horn and the political establishment this fall. Terry has poured so much time, energy, and resources into this campaign in order to fight for the people of Oklahoma. [**Will you show her she can count on you by pitching in $20.20 now?**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/Z7ElPaXfCmf37ErUkj8923zg/Vw6OcZudqBAdznIwOyXs3w) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/Z7ElPaXfCmf37ErUkj8923zg/Vw6OcZudqBAdznIwOyXs3w) [**We can 't hit our goal without your help. name: Rita Hart
subject: We can meet our goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | _We are grateful to have you on Team Hart! We know that right now many people are facing financial hardships, so if you cannot afford to give today -- that 's okay. We appreciate you opening and reading our campaign updates. If you would like to turn off these emails for a bit, then you can do so [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/uWXqF7-mfViQkACLUkoOT3X_9JfrMPeXO4cOxuEudDE=/RHnX3d6Cnfh9XuhvwDh1j7FY1MXb4iCvCt5qOWxwA9Y=)._
* * *
Today is the last day of our first quarter of 2020, and we are so close to reaching our donation goal. **[If 100 people step up right now and donate $25, we will surpass our goal before the first public filing deadline of the year. Will you step up right now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/uWXqF7-mfViQkACLUkoOT3X_9JfrMPeXO4cOxuEudDE=/ews8pYDVhwhYRm2_tEt_rpzIqpPB1vAriaw4eJ6azU4=?refcode=200331-email-am)** There is too much at stake to back down now. I am ready to work for Iowa and take every story I've heard to Washington. I see a path for change, and I've heard what hardworking Iowans need to be successful, thanks to listening to all your stories. **[Help me stay focused on the issues that matter to all of us, like good jobs, decent wages, high-quality education, access to affordable health care and protecting Social Security. We can set ourselves up for success today. Donate right now to meet our public fundraising goal](https://act.myngp.com/el/uWXqF7-mfViQkACLUkoOT3X_9JfrMPeXO4cOxuEudDE=/ews8pYDVhwhYRm2_tEt_rpzIqpPB1vAriaw4eJ6azU4=?refcode=200331-email-am)**. I couldn't do this without all of you, and I am going to take all of your voices with me to Washington. Thanks,
Rita [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uWXqF7-mfViQkACLUkoOT3X_9JfrMPeXO4cOxuEudDE=/ews8pYDVhwhYRm2_tEt_rpzIqpPB1vAriaw4eJ6azU4=?refcode=200331-email-am) | Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa

name: Belinda Biafore
subject: things are changing
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Friend,
I need to ask for your help. We have to raise another $4,796 to meet our fundraising goal for this quarter and we only have until midnight tonight to get there.
Social distancing has changed the way we have to do things. Fundraising events for now aren’t possible, which means we are relying on online donations like never before. This is still an election year and with all that is going on it is more important than ever that we support and elect Democrats. We are doing everything we can, but need your help. Will you make a donation right now and help us reach our goal? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you so much!
Belinda Biafore, Chair, WVDP

clean_body: [] Friend, I need to ask for your help. We have to raise another $4,796 to meet our fundraising goal for this quarter and we only have until midnight tonight to get there. Social distancing has changed the way we have to do things. Fundraising events for now aren’t possible, which means we are relying on online donations like never before. This is still an election year and with all that is going on it is more important than ever that we support and elect Democrats. We are doing everything we can, but need your help. Will you make a donation right now and help us reach our goal? [] [] Thank you so much! Belinda Biafore, Chair, WVDP [] Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www.wvdems.org). This communication is not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Public employees may disregard. Contributions are not tax-deductible. Peter,

If you've seen my last couple of emails, then you know that tonight at midnight marks our first end-of-quarter deadline of 2020. And to all who've pitched in so far to help us finish strong, thank you -- your support at this difficult time means everything to me.

Every contribution, large and small, sends a message to my opponent that her corporate backers are no match for our grassroots power. **[And now that we're in a race against the clock to take our campaign fully digital, you can make a huge difference with just a $100, $50, $25 or any donation today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/0GgrhlJYsvvRMEEl_m9jtJs59ltkDL5XZ65DuI8SlIg=/NAaI7UKaiGoUWSP2Wjcs70np6tvsnzOFw9ee_VHJBLg=)**

We knew these next few months were going to be our most challenging yet -- but the stakes are even higher now than any of us could have imagined. The need for bold, compassionate leadership has never been more urgent, and we can't rest until every single voter knows that our movement is able to deliver. **[Tonight's deadline is our best chance to prove it, so will you give whatever you can to help us hit our goal?](https://act.myngp.com/el/0GgrhlJYsvvRMEEl_m9jtJs59ltkDL5XZ65DuI8SlIg=/NAaI7UKaiGoUWSP2Wjcs70np6tvsnzOFw9ee_VHJBLg=)**

body:
Friends - I have difficult news to share: **A recent poll shows Gary Peters statistically TIED with his right-wing extremist opponent, handpicked by Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell.**
And it gets worse: **Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports the ONLY way Democrats flip the Senate is by winning in Michigan.**
But with Trump, Mitch McConnell and the DeVos family helping funnel millions into Michigan alongside multiple right-wing super PACs to flip this seat, defeat Gary and strengthen their grip on the Senate, **we're in REAL DANGER of missing our ONLY opportunity to take back the Senate for Democrats!**
**With Senate control on the line here in Michigan, our fundraising is falling $9,428 short of what we need to win. And without you, friends, we might not make it.**

But with Trump, Mitch McConnell and the DeVos family helping funnel millions into Michigan alongside multiple right-wing super PACs to flip this seat, defeat Gary and strengthen their grip on the Senate, we're in REAL DANGER of missing our ONLY opportunity to take back the Senate for Democrats! disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Jeb Bradley Chairman
body:

| Friends, If you haven't had a chance, please take a look at Sen. Jeb Bradley's most recent Op-Ed about COVID-19: Hope you are all safe and healthy. - The New Hampshire Senate Republicans

---
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| **Updated Corona Virus Response** **Jeb Bradley - March 29, 2020** **
** People across New Hampshire are coping and adapting to the harsh realities of the Corona Virus. Although Governor Sununu has issued a stay at home or essential services order #17 ([https://www.governor.nh.gov/news-media/emergency-orders/index.htm](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzg5MTIyNjc5Mjg5NjgxMDYxJmM9eDJ3NiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzMyNTg0NDImZD1sNGc3aDhk.EWELLpGPGRcvwMz6tGrxHfOqQw1Sdl0VMXsgjNuzWEo)) --- people in New Hampshire had been doing essentially just that -- and practicing the guidelines of the Center for Disease Control for ‘social distancing’. The Governor’s order #17 lists all the essential services that will remain open. Governor Sununu had acted decisively enacting sixteen previous executive orders. Governor Sununu reacted quickly closing schools and places of gatherings to stem the spread of the insidious virus. Another executive order limits gatherings to no more than ten people per the CDC guidelines. He has also stopped utility disconnections and tenant evictions during the state of emergency. Testing for the virus is expanding in New Hampshire especially as Dartmouth Hitchcock has instituted in-house testing. Health care workers, first responders, and people in hospitals are priorities for testing. It is important if people have the flu symptoms of fever, coughing, or shortness of breath that they contact their medical professional before going to the emergency room. Personal hygiene is critically important for each and every one of us to prevent spread of the virus and the best source of those guidelines can be found at [www.cdc.gov](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzg5MTIyNjc5Mjg5NjgxMDYxJmM9eDJ3NiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzMyNTg0NDQmZD1zMGs4bzht.5trLTXKG6PWavarOqWRI7B_0RoQs8vQUK_OWUvD-pm8). For anyone who needs a test, the cost will be covered by insurance as well as Medicare and Medicaid. People losing their jobs as well as businesses curtailing their operations through no fault of their own are huge problems across the Granite State. Last week 34,000 people registered for unemployment insurance. Governor Sununu temporarily suspended the one week waiting period to receive a first check. Governor Sununu also suspended the increase in rating for any business that lays off employees. Both of these actions by the Governor will make it easier to for hard hit workers and small businesses. If someone has lost their job due to the virus, quarantine orders, or caring for affected family members they may apply for unemployment benefits on line at [www.nhes.nh.gov](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzg5MTIyNjc5Mjg5NjgxMDYxJmM9eDJ3NiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzMyNTg0NDYmZD11M2o2bjNh.NRMgA0EF9xvBUyzI-npXQtqecADdH2G-1hZ_UpHKZT8). Due to the heavy volume of filing the Department of Employment Security has instituted different filing times based on the first letter of your last name. The red box on the left side of the Department’s home page is where to file and the times to file are listed right next to the red box. If someone does not have internet access call [603-271-7700](tel:603-271-7700). Please don’t go to an Employment Security office as interactions are being done electronically or by phone only. People should receive their first unemployment check within eight days after applying. You may also apply for partial unemployment benefits if you have had your hours reduced. People who have lost jobs may also have lost insurance coverage. Someone who has lost coverage may qualify for Medicaid and can apply at [www.nheasy.nh.gov/#](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzg5MTIyNjc5Mjg5NjgxMDYxJmM9eDJ3NiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzMyNTg0NDgmZD1qNXoyeTNm.NP2Kr_wrkzaU02sBteD-NLTzSTiXDpjt5ozG9AMZY5I)or by phone at [844-275-3447](tel:844-275-3447). Job loss also allows someone to purchase health care on the Exchange at [www.healthcare.gov](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzg5MTIyNjc5Mjg5NjgxMDYxJmM9eDJ3NiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzMyNTg0NTAmZD1zNm0yZjJo.S5_L2OSCx9b26wTtFZnGu4fSRSyITGWJ781MtjgtJvM)or by phone at [800-318-2596](tel:800-318-2596). For questions about purchasing a policy someone can access the New Hampshire navigator at [www.acanavigator.com/nh/home](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzg5MTIyNjc5Mjg5NjgxMDYxJmM9eDJ3NiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzMyNTg0NTImZD1rMm8xbzVi.em9rkXUN8_3m7A0JtHq9YAW98qjpPgALsb86R4VOC0I)or by phone [603-931-3853](tel:603-931-3853). Lastly as a possibility for loss of health insurance if you worked at a company with twenty or more employees you can choose to continue your insurance coverage through COBRA. You will have to pay for that coverage and information can be obtained at [www.nh.gov/insurance/consummers/cons_hi_cont_cov.htm or 271-2261](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzg5MTIyNjc5Mjg5NjgxMDYxJmM9eDJ3NiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzMyNTg0NTQmZD11MXM5YzRu.gbVdwc8PNEYLNBYo6OSqTrb9KCFV0G61P65_ajAeHBE). Many people need to get drivers licenses renewed. Instead of going to the Department of Motor Vehicles you can get a temporary six-month extension by calling [603-227-4020](tel:603-227-4020). If you are trying to register a vehicle bought on March 1 or later your temporary plate will be valid until April 30th. Small businesses, the backbone of the New Hampshire economy can access information about resources during the crisis at [www.nheconomy.com/covid19](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzg5MTIyNjc5Mjg5NjgxMDYxJmM9eDJ3NiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzMyNTg0NTYmZD12OGI2ZTRw.drn9KHDFMEdRZHxDROTZm7zEHMYaFDXnKMzuapx27vs). Small businesses may be eligible for low or no interest loans from the Small Business Administration and can apply at [www.sba.gov/funding-programs/disaster-assistance](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzg5MTIyNjc5Mjg5NjgxMDYxJmM9eDJ3NiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzMyNTg0NTgmZD1rMXQxZjFi.90mpKdEpXS9cJGEfxQ_fU-283wS8Af0fFo3teUqSsco)or by phone at [800-659-2955](tel:800-659-2955). As of this writing the United States Senate and the White House have reached a tentative agreement on a $2 trillion recovery piece of legislation. Not all details are known yet but the broad outlines have emerged. If the deal holds together there could be direct payments to people with $75,000 of income or $150,000 for a couple. Enhanced unemployment benefits are likely to be approved and funds for critical industries such as airlines. Funding for hospitals and states is also likely. This is a staggering price tag but the consequences to our economy and hard-working families and small businesses could be catastrophic if we don’t meet the economic challenges our nation faces. Across New Hampshire and across America people are stepping up to the challenge of providing for equipment needed to deal with the virus. Two local companies Tamworth Distillery and Flag Hill Distillery and Winery are manufacturing hand sanitizer which is in short supply. It is incredibly important to say THANK YOU to the many people across our state who are working more than overtime to keep hospitals, supermarkets, banks, gas stations, hardware stores and many other essential services functioning as well as possible. The same THANK YOU applies to all first responders and state and local employees responding to this crisis. A THANK YOU also to every New Hampshire resident practicing social distancing!! Governor Sununu has also announced two websites to encourage volunteer efforts across New Hampshire. The first [www.nhresponds.org](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzg5MTIyNjc5Mjg5NjgxMDYxJmM9eDJ3NiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzMyNTg0NjAmZD10MG8xYTl1.qha_uO5lR_f1C4_TtGFUla-GQh21mKqeeDNFicIzENw)will encourage former health care providers to volunteer at hospitals and clinics. The second website [www.volunteerNH.org](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzg5MTIyNjc5Mjg5NjgxMDYxJmM9eDJ3NiZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzMyNTg0NjImZD1hNnc0cTdl.nfJNamU0R74qtGh0QnZtg8bOzD_ypectRgkiAVOtWhk)is the existing website for volunteers across our state. Please contact me at [603-387-2365](tel:603-387-2365) with any questions. Please Stay Well and Be Safe.

body:
I wanted to update you since Mondaire’s email yesterday. We’ve made some progress, but unfortunately, we’re still $6,257 away from our fundraising goal and today is the last day of the quarter. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/AAE/ni0YAA/t.30j/6snZgNkOSDyB-s5NsZNH0w/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKC69sZaC3sPEOpUBmbWoCD5Da8uCXWSFQAqlK-2BfZb0yehRaOWmkbWWA0JJgxRXsqoZP9WAW2wfkcX-2FD0DLKcD0UdTfr9UOHNmbID69ow-2BGABGkR44g-2FJoMvdQP3YXNjj7qiYdkZmkFphQSNmMuwa4uaouerF88pMfebENIaQY6uq-2FqdvSNSZ9EsT5sg42xjViZZLq6em-2FO-2BziwGwpQkojwA9hCxnyXzYT1PP2NnL49vQ-3D-3D/9rzT) Friend, **** **** **** I wanted to update you since Mondaire’s email yesterday. We’ve made some progress, but unfortunately, _we’re still $6,257 away from our fundraising goal_ and **_today is the last day of the quarter._**
**_[We’re making one final push to hit our goal. Can you make a donation to get us to where we need to be?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/AAE/ni0YAA/t.30j/6snZgNkOSDyB-s5NsZNH0w/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKC69sZaC3sPEOpUBmbWoCD5Da8uCXWSFQAqlK-2BfZb0yfw1Wco-2FZc8B6c39fY4rLtmtmQD1woM8OhHZTuYfRxvYdWa3-2B5DzbQ6Nn1M-2FmXZnEpqVz-2BvqU8HCaExlVMWSKMCTXAN5hXdkFNTexUB7JSg0ZuQMY9boCVGrWF8GXRlGqsEDZqJTv6Rtx1AB26Tf-2BN2jz4XA5k20gdPjF5wnmSi-2BYnbuwBmo2TkvGKGZ4B2V-2BQ-3D-3D/4WvW)_**
[Donate >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/AAE/ni0YAA/t.30j/6snZgNkOSDyB-s5NsZNH0w/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKC69sZaC3sPEOpUBmbWoCD5Da8uCXWSFQAqlK-2BfZb0yUsTN6g8y51XW-2Be2j-2FG9W2-2FPOLCpX7u0XdBoWU1f9SpN41Y1vccdGlCxVHpgNKhyjjzF2EHdpX2vsWMGmcF-2BqE2S9Hw-2FuGyzpY-2FUQ-2FnmfP8PRsgr1HkIlZZ10XraZTjLMKA29zTaFaWtE0nvT0wMO7yx5WqnBA-2BAjaCNMW9uEGiYvy1l-2FIAk0NVE3DhjBz8Sfg-3D-3D/l1xM)
This is the most important fundraising deadline we have. In two weeks, all the candidates will file their last quarterly reports of the campaign. Without any public polling, people watching this campaign closely will evaluate the state of the race largely based on what the candidates can raise.
We need to show the world just how serious we are. We’ve gotten huge endorsements from progressive champions like Senator Elizabeth Warren and groups like the Working Families Party, as well as from elected officials throughout the district. We have volunteers making calls and sending texts every day. We know that we can win. clean_body: I wanted to update you since Mondaire’s email yesterday. We’ve made some progress, but unfortunately, we’re still $6,257 away from our fundraising goal and today is the last day of the quarter. | | | Friend, ** I wanted to update you since Mondaire’s email yesterday. We’ve made some progress, but unfortunately, we’re still $6,257 away from our fundraising goal and today is the last day of the quarter. This is the most important fundraising deadline we have. In two weeks, all the candidates will file their last quarterly reports of the campaign. Without any public polling, people watching this campaign closely will evaluate the state of the race largely based on what the candidates can raise. We need to show the world just how serious we are. We’ve gotten huge endorsements from progressive champions like Senator Elizabeth Warren and groups like the Working Families Party, as well as from elected officials throughout the district. We have volunteers making calls and sending texts every day. We know that we can win. And with another big fundraising quarter, everyone watching this race will know it too. Thank you, Charlie Blaettler, Campaign Manager \---------- From: Mondaire Jones Subj: End of Quarter Friend, Tomorrow is the end of the FEC fundraising quarter. Our quarterly fundraising goals are so important because those numbers translate to real items in our budget, like digital organizers, texting programs, and digital ads. When we miss our goal, we have to cut our budget. And right now, we’re $7,581 short of our goal with 36 hours to go. **** We’ve made so much progress on this campaign, from all of our endorsements to building a team and recruiting hundreds of volunteers. Friend,

President Trump and Republicans running in 2020 rely on reaching these critical goals in order to have the funds necessary to defend our Senate Majority. name: MATCH ANNOUNCEMENT (via Blue Georgia)
subject: falling short isn't an option
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Here's the truth, friend: **If we lose in Georgia, Democrats have no chance to take back the Senate this year. **That's why leaders like Stacey Abrams are ALL IN to elect Reverend Warnock (D) - he's fighting to expand access to affordable health care, protect voting rights and defend the dignity of working people.** **
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk93-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight confirms Democrats CAN take back the Senate, but ONLY if we win in Georgia. With Senate control at stake, we have to do everything we can to flip Georgia blue.
But right now, Kelly Loeffler (R) is pouring $20 _million_ of her own fortune into this race to buy this seat - and even worse, a Trump-linked super PAC just named Georgia one of its TOP targets this election cycle.
**That's why a generous group of donors is MATCHING every donation,_dollar for dollar_ , up to our $50,000 goal _ - _so we can fight back against Republican attacks, flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats!**
**But this critical match opportunity expires at midnight, and falling short of our critical end-of-quarter goal isn't an option. With our first official FEC deadline just hours away, we need you to rush your immediate grassroots support before time runs out:**
**[Please, friend, rush $5 or more right now- $5 becomes $10 - to have TWICE the impact before tonight's 11:59 p.m. FEC deadline - EVERY dollar you give will be DOUBLED so we can win in Georgia and end Mitch McConnell's Senate majority once and for all!](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk93-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
