name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: The Stark Contrast
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/tZzdUW9IW8ehFoKxudrKvxXXRVlqh0qPQaipQzXJgsg=/2T-JgBRtkHxEk21z6C9OywDQOfgVNof3iGHsj9Fs-Hc=?refcode=20200304&amount=25&recurring=1)
---
Team, First, I hope you and your family are staying safe and healthy and we are all practicing social distancing (even from our own family members) as we continue to deal with this crisis. Physical isolation is difficult, but we deal with it by finding new ways to strengthen our community. To that end, our team has been working 7 days a week to make sure our community is informed about COVID-19 resources, staying home, and staying safe.
* We've hosted a virtual town hall with public health professionals, in the fields of epidemiology, pulmonology, and psychiatry.
* Conducted multilingual wellness checks by phone on our senior citizens and our most vulnerable constituents
* Raised awareness of the need for food banks and blood drives across the district
* Assisted in the pickup and delivery of thousands of masks, gloves, and other personal protective equipment for our health care workers and emergency responders on the front lines
* Created and translated informational flyers into our district's multiple languages

Meanwhile, one of my Republican opponents actually claimed that COVID-19 would result in saving more lives than it takes because of the Governor's order halting abortions in Texas. Our campaign will continue to focus on serving the community and fighting for those in need, especially during a crisis. **[If you can help us keep our operation going during this difficult time, your support is greatly needed and appreciated.](https://act.myngp.com/el/tZzdUW9IW8ehFoKxudrKvxXXRVlqh0qPQaipQzXJgsg=/v_rQfnJmwqsOx6_ftFfR3JkNlL-alYHxHQvOPFFT7Yc=?refcode=20200330_eom2&amount=25)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Chip in: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/tZzdUW9IW8ehFoKxudrKvxXXRVlqh0qPQaipQzXJgsg=/ASE1kVg5w2sgRw9s0CSPL6_jhTgYrzybPO-7eSJuYUk=?refcode=20200330_eom2&express_lane=true&amount=25)** **[Chip in: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/tZzdUW9IW8ehFoKxudrKvxXXRVlqh0qPQaipQzXJgsg=/PrTqie6tjXjM3472VG1bJgKqCPJzebtaOCZJVKzUr6I=?refcode=20200330_eom2&express_lane=true&amount=50)** **[Chip in: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/tZzdUW9IW8ehFoKxudrKvxXXRVlqh0qPQaipQzXJgsg=/PrTqie6tjXjM3472VG1bJgKqCPJzebtaOCZJVKzUr6I=?refcode=20200330_eom2&express_lane=true&amount=100)** **[Chip in: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/tZzdUW9IW8ehFoKxudrKvxXXRVlqh0qPQaipQzXJgsg=/PrTqie6tjXjM3472VG1bJgKqCPJzebtaOCZJVKzUr6I=?refcode=20200330_eom2&express_lane=true&amount=250)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/tZzdUW9IW8ehFoKxudrKvxXXRVlqh0qPQaipQzXJgsg=/PrTqie6tjXjM3472VG1bJgKqCPJzebtaOCZJVKzUr6I=?refcode=20200330_eom2&express_lane=true)** Thank you so much for your support. Thank you for standing with us in our fight to restore reason, compassion, and decency when it is needed most. Sincerely, Sri Preston Kulkarni

body:
| |

In case you missed it...
Hello Peter, On Sunday evening, I had a great conversation with Dr. Peggy Stager, a nationally prominent physician with expertise in the care of adolescents and young adults, about conoravirus and its effect on younger individuals. With so much information floating around, it was great to hear the facts from an expert. The video is available to watch anytime on my [F](https://act.myngp.com/el/xW6g5kkMkI3qDLI5Hvu0ZDAvG6bKckMUsK78vJLP_U0=/gBM5NKQkSnni9eGD3i7oqxzzQYaABi3b01EJ_fEfpbE=)[acebook page](https://act.myngp.com/el/xW6g5kkMkI3qDLI5Hvu0ZDAvG6bKckMUsK78vJLP_U0=/cTe9EWH9WTQbkk_KVwiHu8lSyoR9m49qLWyvDkZ-AbM=), and you can [click here to watch](https://act.myngp.com/el/xW6g5kkMkI3qDLI5Hvu0ZDAvG6bKckMUsK78vJLP_U0=/fiyCtG8MRgqUuzhU37xaZMlTnE37a-GO0khLJxtuTgQ=). Please help to like and share the information-it's more important than ever that everyone has access to science-based information as we navigate this difficult time. Thank you. Be well. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/xW6g5kkMkI3qDLI5Hvu0ZDAvG6bKckMUsK78vJLP_U0=/fiyCtG8MRgqUuzhU37xaZMlTnE37a-GO0khLJxtuTgQ=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/xW6g5kkMkI3qDLI5Hvu0ZDAvG6bKckMUsK78vJLP_U0=/nYGUu-vp0uAGOD2wHRzUy1zG5icQghjcnZ0XDLsFKJk=?refcode=stager)

#
We’re getting closer to the FEC deadline at midnight tonight -- but we wanted to take a quick second to share how we’re doing up against our $20,000 goal.
In short? We’re just TWO percent away from reaching our goal.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16730379/177997611/-1390385523?refcode=em20200331-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTQyNThlYi04MzczLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l607sBz4E8jIfILgxo9XpiZT76huoDW1WyZdzTsro58=)
Some quick math: two percent of $20,000 is $400. And while that may seem like a large amount of money, I know we can easily raise that if everyone pitches in whatever spare change they have.
**[But we’re relying on you to step up and help make a dent in that remaining $400 to goal. Will you rush a gift of $5 to our campaign right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16730401/177997650/-1390385523?refcode=em20200331-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTQyNThlYi04MzczLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l607sBz4E8jIfILgxo9XpiZT76huoDW1WyZdzTsro58=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16730403/177997651/-1390385523?refcode=em20200331-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTQyNThlYi04MzczLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l607sBz4E8jIfILgxo9XpiZT76huoDW1WyZdzTsro58=)****
Many will be watching tonight to see if our campaign hits this goal -- the media, the establishment, and our opponents.
We’ve always said that our campaign’s strength lies with you, our supporters, and in the progressive, people-first values that we champion.
**So tonight -- while everyone is watching -- we need to prove that we’re here to fight and hit this goal. And we’re only $400 shy.**
**[We can do this, but not without your help. Let’s show them that this movement is ready to fight. Can I count on you to pitch in before the deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16730404/177997652/-1390385523?refcode=em20200331-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTQyNThlYi04MzczLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l607sBz4E8jIfILgxo9XpiZT76huoDW1WyZdzTsro58=)**
Onward,
Colin Lauderdale
Campaign Manager, Booker for Kentucky
_P.S. Our hearts go out to anyone struggling right now to make ends meet. Please take care of yourself — we only ask you to donate if you can afford to. Your support already means a lot to us._

This may not surprise you, but fundraising for our campaign has been difficult lately... |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16730575/177999401/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2ZiMjg2Yi04NDczLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ghFoe8x25LCTzbzJz3c-_406FHJzZvmztI_Q2hNqt7s=&emci=55fb286b-8473-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=57fb286b-8473-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8780864)
Friends \-- In a moment, we’re going to ask you to **[make a contribution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16730576/177999402/1136511447?refcode=em-200331-all-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2ZiMjg2Yi04NDczLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ghFoe8x25LCTzbzJz3c-_406FHJzZvmztI_Q2hNqt7s=) **to our campaign for Congress. Things have changed significantly in our race, so we hope you’ll let us explain why your support is so important -- especially today.

****TONIGHT marks our first FEC fundraising deadline of 2020. This may not surprise you, but fundraising for our campaign has been difficult lately. Georgette has been extremely busy with city work, and several of our in-person fundraising events have been cancelled.****

To keep Georgette on track, we need to raise $15,000 before our end-of-quarter deadline at midnight. And in order to catch up, we’re depending on **supporters like you** to step up with contributions to help us reach our goal. That’s just the hard truth. ****[We are humbly asking if you can you make a contribution of $3 or more to help fill our fundraising gap. We are only asking because this is so important to our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16730577/177999403/1136511447?refcode=em-200331-all-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2ZiMjg2Yi04NDczLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ghFoe8x25LCTzbzJz3c-_406FHJzZvmztI_Q2hNqt7s=)**
**[DONATE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gomez-q1-2020?refcode=em-200331-all-1-a)**** We can’t do this without you, friend. Thank you.

_Team Gómez_

Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress

| | **Peter, I 'll be brief: **[**I 'm reaching out to ask you to support my 2020 re-election campaign and Voter Protection Project's efforts to hold the House and flip the Senate -> **](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0528/72412298/4e48134d/6104cba2/2813969569/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbW9udGhseV9wb3J0ZXIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDMzMV9Qb3J0ZXJFT1FfVTJfWDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_monthly_porter?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200331_PorterEOQ_U2_X1&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+Irsquom+reaching+out+to+ask+you+to+suppo&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200331_PorterEOQ_U2_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200331_PorterEOQ_U2_X1") **[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0528/72412298/4e48134d/6104cba5/2813969569/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbW9udGhseV9wb3J0ZXIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDMzMV9Qb3J0ZXJFT1FfVTJfWDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_monthly_porter?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200331_PorterEOQ_U2_X1&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200331_PorterEOQ_U2_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200331_PorterEOQ_U2_X1")** I've been in the news lately for getting the CDC to commit to making COVID-19 testing FREE for all Americans. **Sounds like a no-brainer, right?** But here's the truth: When it comes to giveaways for corporations, Trump and the Republicans are full of ideas... but when it comes to providing relief for average Americans, they're stumped! **But even in the midst of a health crisis, Trump and the GOP money machine are in full swing -- and my red-leaning district is one of their top targets. ** [**If the Republicans take back the House, it 'll be a disaster for voting rights and every other issue we care about. name: Congressman Al Green
subject: What’s in the $2 trillion stimulus package
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress |
clean_body: Folks, Last week, Congress passed a $2 trillion stimulus package to address the COVID-19 pandemic. The bill includes approximately: $1,200 in direct relief to every American who earns under $75,000 a year, and more for families with children; $367 billion in assistance to small businesses; $150 billion to state and local agencies working to mitigate the spread of the virus; $100 billion to hospitals hit hard by the virus; $30 billion in emergency education funding to public schools; $25 billion to SNAP and other food assistance programs; $24 billion in relief to farmers and ranchers; $200 million to boost telehealth services; 4 months of pay for workers laid off because of COVID-19; and Tax credits for restaurants, retailers, distillers, and self-employed Americans. Folks, this bill was the direct result of Democrats fighting to get relief for the American people -- not a black-check bailout for big corporations, as President Trump and National Republicans wanted. I am proud to stand with my Democratic colleagues in the House. Throughout this crisis, our focus is and will continue to be the health, safety, wages, and well-being of America’s workers and families. We will always fight for you. In service, Congressman Al Green Congressman Al Green has served the people of Texas' 9th district for 15 years. He is a progressive leader in Washington and was the first Member of Congress to introduce articles of impeachment against President Trump on the House floor.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Answering the Coronavirus: Exponential American Innovation
body:
"America has long led the world in innovation, and the coronavirus won’t change that." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=72634c7da9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Answering the Coronavirus: Exponential American Innovation**

“America has long led the world in innovation, and the coronavirus won’t change that. Indeed, US inventors and entrepreneurs are rising to the occasion, jumping in to fill urgent needs,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes.

“With ramped-up testing the best way to discover who has the virus and so learn what the fatality rate really is, the news from Abbott Laboratories couldn’t be better. The Food and Drug Administration gave emergency-use approval to Abbott’s new test, the fastest available at the point of care: It can deliver a positive result in five minutes and a negative result in under 15.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cb268a1664&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬****President Trump:** [Every citizen and business can make a difference!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=373e06b919&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Like other American companies, Minnesota-based MyPillow is refocusing its production to make face masks for health care workers on the frontlines of the pandemic.” The masks will be shipped to several states, MyPillow founder Mike Lindell said during a White House visit yesterday. Read more from Louis Casiano in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=879701a581&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Brooks Brothers is sewing hope in the coronavirus fight. Instead of churning out preppy staples like seersucker suits and woven-silk ties, America’s oldest retailer is now making masks and gowns for health care workers.” The company’s goal is to make 150,000 masks per day, Nicole Zane reports for the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ceb66a327d&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “On Friday March 20, MSNBC’s Rachel Maddow said President Trump was lying when he said the U.S. Navy hospital ships would arrive in Los Angeles and New York City in the near future. Exactly a week later, the USNS Mercy arrived in the Port of Los Angeles.” Yesterday, the USNS Comfort arrived in New York, Chrissy Clark writes in [_The Federalist_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=82fbd8e283&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bf0991f5f4&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6f29974791&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=8460a57527)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Team Christy
subject: Before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()

| | _The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._
Peter,

We need your help.

As we get closer and closer to our special election, we need to increase the size and scope of what our campaign is doing -- and that means getting to our $50,000 end-of-quarter goal by TONIGHT.

name: Tina Smith
subject: I want to be honest with you for a moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hey, can you spare a few minutes? I want to be honest with you for a moment. My team and I had set an aggressive online fundraising goal for Q1 — the first financial quarter of this critical election year — and the resources we projected would have been enough to fight back against all that we expect Republicans will throw at us in the coming months. Unfortunately, our numbers have taken a significant dip. I’m not surprised — in fact, I completely understand why this has happened. To help our campaign adapt to this new reality, we have moved all of our organizing and fundraising efforts online until this crisis has passed. It was the right thing to do. But that means we’re falling a bit short on our goals ahead of tonight’s FEC fundraising deadline. That’s why I’m turning to you: **If it makes sense for you financially, can you add a donation to our campaign before our filing deadline at midnight tonight? These are difficult times, so I only want you to pitch in if you can afford to at this time. But I’m going to tell you the same thing I tell my team: Moments like this reinforce what’s at stake in this election. We must stiffen our backbones and roll up our sleeves because we need to get this right.
Thank you for anything you can give today. Take care of yourself.
— Tina

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I'll come right out and ask you this question
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
I'll just come right out and ask, folks -- **Our FEC fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight, and we 're just short of reaching our goal with no time to spare. Can you contribute $10 or more before the deadline comes to a close?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200331?refcode=em-200331-eoq-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200331?refcode=em-200331-eoq-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
Here's the truth: I never imagined sending an email like this, but our country is facing an unprecedented public health emergency. Our schools, our places of worship, and many businesses are closed as we do our civic duty to slow the outbreak of the coronavirus.
We've canceled our in-person fundraisers. Our average online contribution has unsurprisingly dropped in the last few weeks. And my campaign manager is working overtime to rework our paid media budget, just as Mitch McConnell's super PAC booked millions of dollars in ads to help our opponent.
This crisis will require a different kind of campaign to flip Colorado's Senate seat blue -- one that none of us could have imagined just a few short weeks ago. That means messages like this are more important to winning this election than ever before.
We can't win this election without a lot of folks who are able stepping up for our team in the coming weeks, which is why I'm personally asking:
**Please, can I count on you to donate $10 or more right now? If you can spare it, your contribution before our FEC deadline at midnight tonight will ensure my team has the resources we need to respond to any attacks from McConnell 's super PAC:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200331?refcode=em-200331-eoq-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

---

---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200331?refcode=em-200331-eoq-full&amount=100&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200331?refcode=em-200331-eoq-full&amount=250&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200331?refcode=em-200331-eoq-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
Anything you can chip in today would make a huge difference, but please only give if you can afford it. I know people are struggling right now -- and it's critical you put your family and your health first.
Thanks for all you do. Stay safe, my friend.
-- John
P.S. We know this is a difficult time, so please take care of yourself and your loved ones and only pitch in if you can afford to do so. To pause our emails until this public health emergency has passed, "". Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218 ""

name: Kimberley Boggus
subject: Our campaign is taking off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
We've stepped up our digital presence and folks are starting to get the word: Admiral Mike must be Iowa's next Senator.
|
---
| |
---

| | It's true, team -- we've stepped up our digital presence and folks are starting to get the word: Admiral Mike must be Iowa's next Senator. (When we get him elected, shall we call him Admiral Franken, or the Junior Senator from Iowa, Mike Franken, Iowa's Admiral?) But we need to keep up this momentum. Aaron, our communications director, told you about the 99 ads we're running (one for each county), and we could really use your support to keep them online as long as possible. **The Admiral knows we can win this, and he 's personally matching donations for the next 12 hours. ** [_**Can you chip in, $5 before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline?**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2496/33365068/4a683cea/3f8bef3f/1606427946/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfmatch03?amount=5&refcode=FRA_20200331am_eom5_em_fr_all_L1") | [Chip In >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2496/33365068/4a683cea/3f8bef38/1606427946/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfmatch03?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200331am_eom5_em_fr_all_btn1")
---
We know that not everyone can donate right this minute. This is a difficult time, admittedly. But you can still make valuable contributions by joining our Facebook group and helping spread the Admiral's message.
[Join Our Facebook Group >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2496/33365068/4a683cea/3f8bef39/1606427946/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://www.facebook.com/groups/iowansforfranken")
---
You can also follow our [_**Twitter**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2496/33365068/4a683cea/3f8bef3a/1606427946/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://twitter.com/FrankenforIowa") and [_**Facebook**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2496/33365068/4a683cea/3f8bef3b/1606427946/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://www.facebook.com/FrankenforIowa") pages to see when the next live online event is. We've had hundreds of Iowans show up and chat with Mike -- and it's honestly one of his favorite campaign activities!
Thank you for your participation and support,
Kimberley
Campaign Manager

[DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2496/33365068/4a683cea/3f8bef34/1606427946/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfmatch03?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200331am_eom5_em_fr_all_ftr")

| ,

I hope you and your family are doing well and staying safe and healthy. Tonight, at midnight, we close the books on the first quarter of 2020.

We are a little short of our goal for the quarter. Will you contribute today to help our campaign reach its goal?
---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://browningfrocongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=69dc25bfa90bd52cf57d45ea0&id=faa9c92735&e=6800876418 "DONATE NOW!")
---
| I know this is a difficult time for many.

We have changed the way we operate our business, schools, and life due to COVID-19.

_We have also changed the way we campaign, conducting it now through online posts and phone calls._

We are doing our best to keep the energy and momentum up around the campaign even in uncertain times.

But we need your help to accomplish our goals.

_**Can I count on you for your most generous donation today?**_
---

---
| I am running for Congress to bring back our voice to the district.

I will represent our principles and convictions in the nation’s capital. I will always listen to you and bring your hopes, dreams, and concerns with me to Washington.

**Please consider donating what you can to help our campaign so we may have clear and transparent representation in D.C.**

name: David Hill
subject: Can you help?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC
body:
I wanted to reach out and stress how important this upcoming election is for CD-5.
I wanted to reach out to emphasize the importance of this upcoming election for our district. Kendra Horn is simply not representative of our voice in Congress, and it's negatively affecting all of us. CD-5 is a special district, filled with great people and a bright future. We deserve better representation.

Kendra Horn is one of Nancy Pelosi's puppets. She only responds to Michael Bloomberg and special interests. Our campaign is fighting against career politicians and for the people of CD-5.

As your representative, I will bring your voice back to Congress, but I need your help. **The first quarter FEC deadline is tonight!**

Please help us reach our goal. Click the link below to donate.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: Your support is more important now than ever
body:
We have an important FEC deadline tonight. We need your help to close the gap | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/03cd042d0fd7/your-support-is-more-important-now-than-ever?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | _At a time when a lot of Americans are dealing with economic uncertainty, we completely understand if you cannot afford to donate right now. Stay safe. Let's get through this together._
---
|
---
|
I'll get right to it. At midnight tonight, we have our first fundraising deadline of 2020. **We need to show the Republicans and the special interests like oil companies, the NRA, and the corporations that we mean business. **

My opponent has a long list of big money backers that will spend any amount of money to beat us in November, but I have _you. _

If you can, [could you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help us finish this quarter strong? ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=83e11ae40c&e=140a9b81e7)

We can flip IL 16 together, and I need your support now more than ever.

Thank you.

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic nominee for Congress, IL 16

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Not for Amateurs
body:
We Mean Business | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/not-for-amateurs?e=41f8e27552)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

** As the only consistent conservative businessman in the race,** **I know firsthand the challenges faced by our Kansas small businesses.** I’ve weathered recessions and downturns, met a payroll throughout – sometimes skipping a check for my own family to do so, and have navigated supply chain issues, capital needs, and dealing with the endless burden of government regulations and taxes.

_** Folks, now is not the time to send amateurs and ideologues to Washington.**_ **We will need to rebuild our economy after the current crisis passes. ** **That’s a job for those who have been there in the trenches** , meeting payrolls, understanding capital needs and securing the critical personnel and resources necessary to make a business a going concern and renewed job creation a reality.

**Today is a critical 2020 first quarter finance deadline.** **Will you support our campaign with a contribution of $25, $50, $100 or $250?**

---
| [DONATE NOW](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=be13fdf1f4&e=41f8e27552 "DONATE NOW")
---
| ** Your support today sends a message that Kansas voters mean BUSINESS** and are done with the politicians and Washington political games.

---
| [DONATE NOW](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=0b52221a5a&e=41f8e27552 "DONATE NOW")
---
| [VIEW DAVE'S PRIORITIES](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=0654734879&e=41f8e27552 "VIEW DAVE'S PRIORITIES")
---
| |
---

_**Thank you again for standing with me as we take a stand together for our families and our nation!**_ **Dave**

---

name: Molly McGuire, JeffMerkley.com
subject: planning for the future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e64d/6cd27893/53973ddf/15905ff9/3654954680/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | Hey, Right now, we're all hunkered down, alternately watching the news and avoiding the news. Personally, when I'm not working, I'm trying out new bread recipes, pulling weeds, and binge watching tv shows. Like you, I'm also thinking about the future. A lot. I've made tentative travel plans to go fishing and I'm hoping to go camping with my friends this summer. I can't wait for this all to be over. But you know what? My vision of the future also includes a world where **_competent_** leaders are working together to craft a safe, healthy, progressive future for all of us. That means electing a new president and a new U.S. Senate. And it means defending progressive champions like Jeff Merkley. **Will you join me in making a commitment for a progressive future?**[**Chip in a few dollars right now and let's make a big, bold statement that we can bring America back from the brink.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e64d/6cd27893/53973ddf/15905ff6/3654954680/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-03-31-eoq&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") We've got this big deadline looming tonight. It's the last quarterly deadline before the Oregon primary election -- when we'll find out which of the four Republicans is taking on Jeff. **[Will you show Jeff with a small donation that we've all still got his back?](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e64d/6cd27893/53973ddf/15905ff6/3654954680/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-03-31-eoq&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") **He's fighting for a response to the virus that includes everyone and leaves no one out -- stand up and let him know you're with him. Thank you, and stay healthy. _Molly_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e64d/6cd27893/53973ddf/15905ff7/3654954680/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2020-03-31-eoq&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e64d/6cd27893/53973ddf/15905ff4/3654954680/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2020-03-31-eoq&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e64d/6cd27893/53973ddf/15905ff5/3654954680/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2020-03-31-eoq&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e64d/6cd27893/53973ddf/15905ff2/3654954680/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2020-03-31-eoq&refcode2=express-buttons")

body:

But I have been blown away to see the response from conservatives around the district who are standing for CAPITALISM, secure borders, and our constitutional rights.
This is all very encouraging, Peter, but unfortunately, we’re not done yet.

clean_body: Alex set a big goal for us yesterday, one that I almost didn’t know if it was possible. But I have been blown away to see the response from conserva Peter, Alex set a big goal for us yesterday, one that I almost didn’t know if it was possible. But I have been blown away to see the response from conservatives around the district who are standing for CAPITALISM, secure borders, and our constitutional rights. This is all very encouraging, Peter, but unfortunately, we’re not done yet. We are still shy ABOUT $6,500, and our deadline is in just a few hours. This goal is big, but completely obtainable. Lisa Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

body:
There’s still work to do, and I’m determined to see it through. Now more than ever.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16737773/178063007/464986751?refcode=em_fr_2020.03.31_b2_ed_nonopeners&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTM3NWMxZC05YzczLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FIrYolYJNgpKU4yHSh7hdHKaEoIqLWkpwgKXYSkL6Hw=) _We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._ Friend,

**I’m running for Congress to build a future where every American family can succeed.** That means we have to ensure access to affordable health care, tackle climate change, lower prescription drug costs, and protect critical programs like Medicare and Social Security.

**To put it simply: There’s still work to do, and I’m determined to see it through.**_Now more than ever._

Now more than ever. = We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to. Friend, I’m running for Congress to build a future where every American family can succeed. That means we have to ensure access to affordable health care, tackle climate change, lower prescription drug costs, and protect critical programs like Medicare and Social Security. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Election rumors
body:
The Fake News Media has been trying to start a narrative that the November Election will be postponed.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-370151-869396-4934728-a0485a86b8-62f2c43e3f)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-370151-869396-4934727-a34ad84576-62f2c43e3f) The Fake News Media has been trying to start a narrative that the November Election will be postponed.

But that’s just not happening. It’s just the false hope of Democrats who are stuck with Joe Biden as their champion.

And because the November Election is still on, I sincerely need your help.

We’re just [$16,200 away from hitting our 1st Quarter fundraising goal](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-370151-869396-4934727-a34ad84576-62f2c43e3f) – and we have 10 hours to hit it! [If you’re able, please pitch in whatever you can today.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-370151-869396-4934727-a34ad84576-62f2c43e3f)

With so many Americans who are now without income due to the Coronavirus, I’ve held off on asking for donations until now.

If you were fired, furloughed or laid off and don’t have an income, please do not donate today. Instead, write me back and let me know if YOU need anything.

If you can donate, please do so. The election is moving forward and the Democrats have shown how grossly irresponsible they are by playing politics while our nation is in crisis.

That includes my opponent Lois Frankel, who while relaxing from her home, is focused more on identity politics than on saving lives!

As my campaign volunteers have been sewing masks for healthcare workers and donating blood, Lois Frankel – JUST TODAY -- has been tweeting, “Women need #EqualPay now” and “Trans people are vulnerable to being denied healthcare.”

I can’t make this up.

**OUR NURSES AND DOCTORS NEED PROTECTION! OUR CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT IS IN A STATE HOTSPOT – and Lois Frankel wants to play political games!!**

[Help me hit my goal today. Help me defeat Frankel and make sure she never represents Americans again – because she is a total failure.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-370151-869396-4934727-a34ad84576-62f2c43e3f)

Americans are dying. Frankel’s constituents are dying. Nurses and doctors are exposed every second they’re on the job – and their Democrat Congresswoman is sitting back on her lush lawn, tweeting about equal pay.

[Help me get to Washington, and let’s put an end to the ridiculously inept behavior of the Democrats.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-370151-869396-4934727-a34ad84576-62f2c43e3f)

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. The FEC filing period ends tonight at midnight. We have just $16,200 left to raise to hit our goal. [Help me get there by chipping in whatever you can.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-370151-869396-4934727-a34ad84576-62f2c43e3f)

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-370151-869396-84585d41bbe610b-62f2c43e3f)

---

Respectfully, Laura Loomer P.S. The FEC filing period ends tonight at midnight. We have just $16,200 left to raise to hit our goal. Last week, we saw two different styles of Kentucky leadership.
We saw Governor Beshear lead the nation, take steps to flatten the curve, and provide vital information and resources to our friends and neighbors in need.
Then, we saw Thomas Massie, Andy Barr, and Mitch McConnell use their position, from 500 miles away, to grandstand and carve out more benefits for big corporations and the wealthy. To make matters worse, last week, Mitch McConnell’s super PAC announced it’s going to spend $67 million across six states this year, including Kentucky.
**We deserve better.**
Josh is running a strong campaign to flip Kentucky’s 6th District. Unlike his opponent, he refuses any corporate PAC or special-interest money and doesn’t have country club connections to build a campaign slush fund.
Right now, we’re on pace not just to be competitive, but to win.
Together, we can send Andy Barr — who reaps the benefits from McConnells big fundraisers and massive ad spends — packing in November. **But we need your help before our fundraising deadline tonight at midnight.**

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Why I'm with Reverend Warnock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend,

This is a difficult time in our nation's history.

The threats we're facing - from foreign election interference to stagnating wages to global health crises - put the future of our democracy at risk.
That's why this year's elections are the most consequential of our lifetimes -- and why it's never been more important to elect Democratic leaders who will fight for the most vulnerable among us. **That's why I endorsed Reverend Raphael Warnock for U.S. Senate in Georgia - [and why I'm asking you to support his campaign today.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk88-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
Reverend Warnock is the senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church, the spiritual home of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. If elected, he'd be the first black senator our state has _ever_ elected. Reverend Warnock is running to restore moral leadership to Washington and to stand up for Georgia families who have been left behind by Republicans like Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump.
With Republicans turning their backs on the hardworking people of Georgia, it's never been more important _ _ to elect leaders like Reverend Warnock who will lead _by and for the people_ - someone who will be a champion for voting rights, workers' rights, affordable health care and more.

Reverend Warnock gives me hope that we can create a better and brighter future for all, not just the lucky few.
But here's what's at stake: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats _can_ take back the Senate - but we _have_ to win in Georgia. Winning this battleground state is key to Democrats righting the ship and retaking the Senate majority.
**Right now, Reverend Warnock is up against his _very first_ FEC _ _ deadline of the campaign - but time is running out, and he can't hit his crucial fundraising goal without your support. So I have to ask: ****[Please, friend, will you give $5 or more now ](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk88-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")****[-](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk88-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")****[ before the midnight deadline on Tuesday ](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk88-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")****[-](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk88-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")****[ to help Reverend Warnock reach his campaign's first end-of-quarter goal, flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk88-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
A portion of the proceeds raised from this email will be donated to The Giving Kitchen, an organization supporting members of the food service industry facing crisis.
Thanks for fighting with us.

Stacey Abrams
| | [Contribute](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk88-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")
---

name: Team Michelle
subject: just hours away from our first FEC deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
In just a few hours, we're going to be facing our first FEC deadline of Michelle De La Isla’s campaign for Congress in Kansas’ 2nd District. This deadline is huge -- our fundraising is about to be made public for the first time and the numbers we put up will be used to judge the strength of our grassroots team.

Friends, we'll keep this brief.

body:
| | | _We are grateful to have you on Team Hart! We know that right now many people are facing financial hardships, so if you cannot afford to give today -- that 's okay. We appreciate you opening and reading our campaign updates. If you would like to turn off these emails for a bit, then you can do so [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/2U95RlxQlJmtsV5ClnoD2NnG9-0CL9-PEu3sCkUoyjM=/dEhKFe2icOUz1_T8PMFNDxRcU7J_hZUqNPvZM7WnClo=)._
* * *
I wanted to make sure Rita's message got in front of you today. We're so close to our goal, and we only have a few hours left to hit it. **[Help us finish strong with our public end-of-quarter goal so our Republican opponents see exactly how strong our campaign is.](https://act.myngp.com/el/2U95RlxQlJmtsV5ClnoD2NnG9-0CL9-PEu3sCkUoyjM=/GDOA3og-kBhIwgqNG_wTR86ow5P1Vbg0XHmC5axW4vk=?refcode=200331-email-pm)** If we reach this goal, we really will have the means and the momentum to meet our campaign objectives and WIN a district that Donald Trump won in 2016. Campaign Manager **\------Forwarded Message------** Today is the last day of our first quarter of 2020, and we are so close to reaching our donation goal. **[If 100 people step up right now and donate $25, we will surpass our goal before the first public filing deadline of the year. Will you step up right now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/2U95RlxQlJmtsV5ClnoD2NnG9-0CL9-PEu3sCkUoyjM=/GDOA3og-kBhIwgqNG_wTR86ow5P1Vbg0XHmC5axW4vk=?refcode=200331-email-pm)** There is too much at stake to back down now. I am ready to work for Iowa and take every story I've heard to Washington. I see a path for change, and I've heard what hardworking Iowans need to be successful, thanks to listening to all your stories. **[Help me stay focused on the issues that matter to all of us, like good jobs, decent wages, high-quality education, access to affordable health care and protecting Social Security. Donate right now to meet our public fundraising goal](https://act.myngp.com/el/2U95RlxQlJmtsV5ClnoD2NnG9-0CL9-PEu3sCkUoyjM=/GDOA3og-kBhIwgqNG_wTR86ow5P1Vbg0XHmC5axW4vk=?refcode=200331-email-pm)**. name: =?utf-8?b?VGVyZXNh4oCZcw==?= iPhone
subject: I’m humbled
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
I’m humbled, friends.
Just yesterday I received word that the National Organization for Women PAC is endorsing our campaign for the United States Senate. With just hours to go before our FEC deadline, it couldn’t come at a better time.
We have just a few hours left before the FEC deadline at midnight, after which all of our fundraising numbers will go public. This is a moment when we need to demonstrate to Mitch McConnell and David Perdue that we have the support and the momentum to win in November.
This is a difficult time for our country and I continue to be overwhelmed by the support we’ve received in these past few weeks.
With that being said, we’re just shy of hitting tonight’s goal with the deadline at midnight. I would really appreciate your support — no matter how much you can give. Can you donate? Pitch in using this link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em033120-pm&refcode2=b5beb08d-a773-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&noskip=true
Teresa
Sent from my iPhone

PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Contributions or gifts to Teresa Tomlinson for Senate are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Thanks for your support!

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: New York Strong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friends- After September 11th we came together. After Hurricane Sandy we came together. Today we are coming together once again. The issues are important, our vision for America is important, and there are crucial differences between me and my opponent - but we have to come together to meet this challenge head on.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=128A175A1A2183)
---
| | |
---
| | Friends-

After September 11th we came together.

After Hurricane Sandy we came together.

Today we are coming together once again.

The issues are important, our vision for America is important, and there are crucial differences between me and my opponent - but we have to come together to meet this challenge head on.

Here’s just some of the things I’ve been working on since our last update:

* We’ve held telephone town halls with doctors to answer questions and keep people safe

* We’ve personally delivered hand sanitizer, gloves and masks to workers in desperate need

* We’ve worked with our Governor and elected officials at every level to coordinate a response

[Watch Nicole discuss the city, state and federal response to COVID-19 on PBS’ MetroFocus:](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=128A175A1A2185)

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=128A175A1A2185)
---
| | |
---
| | Yes - today is our federal reporting deadline and a crucial marker for our campaign. Usually I’d ask for your donation - today I’m asking for your prayers for our medical workers and everyone who is keeping us safe and healthy. I’m asking for you to support local businesses who need us now more than ever. And I’m asking for you to follow President Trump and Dr. Fauci’s recommendation on social distancing to help us get through this.

I’m proud that my campaign has been able to use our funds that you helped me raise to spread important information and that I’ve been able to put resources right into the hands of those who need it.

If you have any questions or need anything you can visit my website for up to date information on our response to the Coronavirus and where you can find resources: [nicolemalliotakis.com/covid-19](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=128A175A1A2184)

Be safe and stay strong, we’ll get through this!

---
| |
---
| | Nicole Malliotakis

---
| | |
---
| | | | We have created a COVID-19 Information Center to bring you the latest news.

---
| | | [ VISIT PAGE ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=128A175A1A2184)

name: Andrew Bourne
subject: following up on Greg's email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Hey, it's Andrew, the finance director for Greg's campaign -

**As Greg mentioned in an email this morning, he is focusing all of his efforts on protecting all of us during the coronavirus crisis -- **which has meant the suspension of all fundraising work.

That means that as a campaign, we are _doubling-down on our digital fundraising efforts_ to help us at least keep pace.

So... while we are going to fall short of our original goal, _**we do still need your help**_ to reach our minimum fundraising targets before tonight's quarterly deadline at MIDNIGHT.

**[Will you chip in now to help our campaign double-down on digital and match our quarterly fundraising goal?](https://act.myngp.com/el/W9ZIoRIhU_GdYNgl82IVLSapeQL8S4w-SLFcicbrnjg=/fKBxgmzrf6ZotsaFbweC0Rycq5rmpMVKeWnMFDCu2AU=?refcode=X_033120_EOQ_B&amount=25&recurring=auto)**

name: Team Kathy
subject: 10 years of health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
We're in the fight for 10 more years (and then some)!
|
---

| | Wow -- this month marks the 10th anniversary of the Affordable Care Act. The ACA has helped millions of Americans get access to the health care they need, but Republicans have been relentless in their attempts to take it away. Now, they're supporting a lawsuit heading to the Supreme Court that would overturn Obamacare in its entirety if it succeeds. Expanding affordable health care is a huge part of why Kathy's in this race, and she's still in the fight to protect health care for North Carolinians and Americans all over the country. In Congress, Kathy will build on the ACA to help more people get covered and to bring down the cost of health care. The ACA has helped millions of Americans get access to the health care they need, but Republicans have been relentless in their attempts to take it away. Now, they're supporting a lawsuit heading to the Supreme Court that would overturn Obamacare in its entirety if it succeeds. Expanding affordable health care is a huge part of why Kathy's in this race, and she's still in the fight to protect health care for North Carolinians and Americans all over the country. In Congress, Kathy will build on the ACA to help more people get covered and to bring down the cost of health care. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: Some resources for you and your family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
| |
---
| | | Friends,

This is an unusual and difficult time for Kansans and Americans. First off, I sincerely hope you and your loved ones are safe and well. I can tell you this situation has increased my gratitude for the things that matter most, particularly my family. We continue to pray daily for those who are suffering the loss of a loved one or dealing with job loss and other major disruptions in their lives.

Typically at this time, our team would be sending you an email to ask you to consider contributing to our campaign before the end of the quarter, but Kansans are facing real problems right now.

I'm not writing to ask for anything. I'm writing to let you know I am here if you have any questions I can help you get answers to, and I wanted to provide you with a few helpful resources:

**Resource #1:** Congress and President Trump acted quickly to approve some financial relief for families and businesses during these difficult circumstances. You can use the [attached calculator](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=215512f66c&e=1050d051da) to see how much of that you should be getting. In a nutshell:
* Americans who filed single on their most recent tax return and made less than $75,000 of adjusted gross income will receive a check of $1,200.
* Those who are married and filing jointly on their most recent tax return and made less than $150,000 of adjusted gross income will receive a check of $2,400.
* For each child listed as a dependent, the filer will receive an additional $500.

---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=de1399f2a7&e=1050d051da)
---
| **Resource #2:** Our Kansas House leadership put together an online resource [www.kansastogether.com](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=4338f11e39&e=1050d051da) where you can find links for help from the different departments the state has to assist with filing for unemployment or cash assistance, business relief, as well as what schools are doing now that the school has been moved to a home learning set-up.
* Small businesses are eligible for loans that can be forgiven. [Here's an article with more information.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9f7fd29c81&e=1050d051da)

**Resource #3:** If you have concerns or questions about COVID-19 and how Kansas is faring during this worldwide pandemic, the Kansas Department of Health and Environment (KDHE) is regularly updating their [website](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9ea4a7c575&e=1050d051da) with the latest local statistics related to COVID-19. KDHE Secretary Lee Norman holds regular press conferences that you can watch through this site, so you can hear the most up to date information related to our state's response. There is a lot of helpful information there if you have questions about symptoms, how to keep yourself and others healthy, and what to do if you or someone in your home becomes ill.

Please feel free to reach out if there is anything I can be helpful with. Kansans are made of strong stuff and I know we will weather this time together even though we are physically apart. God bless you!

Yours in the fight,
Jake LaTurner
---

name: NH Senate Republicans
subject: Update: Measures to protect hardworking NH Residents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Jeb Bradley Chairman
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzg5MzEzNjg0ODY1NTUzNTI0JmM9ZzNzNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzMzOTA3NzQmZD1pOXI4bTB2.VJ56Tchygl4bhBhgsGBXdH__yn4w9HKqC0bVGYkdeTw)
| | |
---
| [ ](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzg5MzEzNjg0ODY1NTUzNTI0JmM9ZzNzNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzMzOTA3ODImZD14OGsydzNo.gUVg5UcSRVYX26ATzG7MLG8B0caEbo7AVx_Ol8Pspd8)
---
---
| |
---
| **Measures to Protect Hardworking ****New Hampshire Residents** **By Sen. Jeb Bradley -- March 31** Over the last several weeks, conditions in New Hampshire and across the United States have changed dramatically as everyone copes with the Corona Virus. Understandably, much of the focus of the response has been on public health, social distancing, personal hygiene and the heroic efforts of frontline health care workers, first responders and so many essential service workers such as those who work in supermarkets. The President has extended the federal Corona Virus guidelines until the end of April. Governor Sununu issued a stay at home order until May 4th. Essential services in New Hampshire such as supermarkets, pharmacies, hardware stores, gas stations can remain open. Those essential services are listed in Governor Sununu’s Executive order #17 and can be found here: [https://www.governor.nh.gov/news-media/emergency-orders/index.htm](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzg5MzEzNjg0ODY1NTUzNTI0JmM9ZzNzNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzMzOTA3OTImZD1qNHg1cDds.RbFIOdfkT5yVTqfyEZ1T-zTEDNGkm9OQLlgG1DSivgs). The Corona Virus is also having a profound impact on hardworking New Hampshire residents and small businesses. On March 27thCongress passed and the President signed into law a $2 trillion rescue package that will provide temporary assistance to impacted people and businesses. The most important small business provision is the Paycheck Protection Program or PPP. According to the U.S. Senate Committee on Small Business, any business that employs 500 or fewer people is eligible for loans comparable to 250% of their average monthly payroll expenses. This loan has an upper limit of $10 million. It is expected to cover 8 weeks of payroll and can include sick or medical leave and health insurance premiums. The loan can also cover mortgage interest, rents, leases and utility costs. If small business owners retain all of their employees the loan will be forgiven and turned into a grant. In order for the loan to turn into a grant, businesses need to retain employees but if a business has already released employees the grant is still allowed if the business rehires them by June 30th. If the business payroll has decreased by more than 25%, the loan forgiveness will be reduced by the corresponding amount. The application deadline for these loans / grants is June 30th and retroactive to February 15th2020\. However, with small businesses doing everything possible to stay afloat and keep employees on the payroll, the $350 billion that has been allocated under the federal legislation is not likely to cover every eligible business. There may well be subsequent legislation in Washington but for now that is the limit. Final guidance on the PPP must still be issued by the Treasury Department. That should be forthcoming very shortly and once that guidance is issued commercial banks and community banks will be able to make these loans which will turn into grants per the conditions already listed. Small business owners should contact their banks as soon as possible. New Hampshire Bankers have made it very clear that they will do everything in their power to assist small businesses through this very trying time. Banks will need to verify a business’s payroll records for loans to be turned into grants. While the PPP will go through commercial and community banks, Economic Injury Disaster Loans will continue to be administered by the Small Business Association which can be reached at [800-659-2955](tel:800-659-2955) or [www.sba.gov/funding-programs/disaster-assistance](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzg5MzEzNjg0ODY1NTUzNTI0JmM9ZzNzNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzMzOTA3OTgmZD14OWMzbDdk.Gd4liIXg1PHnusQ48NqFVNtFdQ-wmqeyJYdUk8ufwNc). It should also be noted that Governor Sununu has allowed for deferred tax payments for anyone subject to the Business Profits Tax, Business Enterprise Tax and Interest and Dividends Tax. That deferral will extend to June 15th2020 and will apply to the I&D; tax up to $10,000 owed and the combined BET/BPT taxes up to $50,000 owed. Another key provision in the federal legislation is an expansion of unemployment benefits. According to a summary published by Kevin Brady of the U.S. House Ways and Means Committee, $250 billion has been appropriated to enhance traditional unemployment benefits. The maximum unemployment benefit in New Hampshire is $427. Governor Sununu has already allowed benefits to be paid without a one week wait time and also announced the minimum benefit will increase from $32 per week to $168. New Hampshire residents who have lost their job due to the virus are eligible for unemployment if an employer has closed or reduced employees, if someone is self-quarantined or family members are in quarantine, or if school closures force parents to care for their children. People who are self-employed and who cannot operate their business temporarily due to these conditions are also eligible for unemployment benefits. If someone’s hours have been reduced, they too are eligible for unemployment. Unemployment benefits in New Hampshire can be applied for at the Department of Employment Security [www.nhes.nh.gov](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzg5MzEzNjg0ODY1NTUzNTI0JmM9ZzNzNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzMzOTA4MDImZD1lMXA2ZDZi.ElBCFywVBhc7-Yw-e5iB9T84CoLKbqnnpgQ-kD58y38). Use the red box on the homepage but also due to high volume of filing apply per the guidelines right next to the red box. Employment Security can also be reached by phone at 271-7700. In addition to New Hampshire unemployment benefits, the federal legislation allows for a 4-month temporary $600 weekly payment on top of the New Hampshire benefit. This temporary benefit will extend to July 31. The new federal law also allows for an extra 13 weeks of compensation for those who experience longer term unemployment. These economic measures are unprecedented, but so too is the threat to hard working New Hampshire residents and small businesses which is why these measures are so necessary. Along with ramping up virus testing, providing more protective equipment and enhancing medical response capabilities we will get through this crisis despite the terrible human toll the virus is causing. Most importantly, Thank You to the many health care providers, pharmacy employees, grocery store employees and many many other New Hampshire people who have stepped up to confront the virus and protect their fellow citizens. As always, please reach out to me with questions at [603-387-2365](tel:603-387-2365).

Understandably, much of the focus of the response has been on public health, social distancing, personal hygiene and the heroic efforts of frontline health care workers, first responders and so many essential service workers such as those who work in supermarkets. The President has extended the federal Corona Virus guidelines until the end of April. Governor Sununu issued a stay at home order until May 4th. Essential services in New Hampshire such as supermarkets, pharmacies, hardware stores, gas stations can remain open. Those essential services are listed in Governor Sununu’s Executive order #17 and can be found here: . The Corona Virus is also having a profound impact on hardworking New Hampshire residents and small businesses. On March 27thCongress passed and the President signed into law a $2 trillion rescue package that will provide temporary assistance to impacted people and businesses. The most important small business provision is the Paycheck Protection Program or PPP. According to the U.S. Senate Committee on Small Business, any business that employs 500 or fewer people is eligible for loans comparable to 250% of their average monthly payroll expenses. This loan has an upper limit of $10 million. It is expected to cover 8 weeks of payroll and can include sick or medical leave and health insurance premiums. The loan can also cover mortgage interest, rents, leases and utility costs. If small business owners retain all of their employees the loan will be forgiven and turned into a grant. In order for the loan to turn into a grant, businesses need to retain employees but if a business has already released employees the grant is still allowed if the business rehires them by June 30th. If the business payroll has decreased by more than 25%, the loan forgiveness will be reduced by the corresponding amount. The application deadline for these loans / grants is June 30th and retroactive to February 15th2020\. However, with small businesses doing everything possible to stay afloat and keep employees on the payroll, the $350 billion that has been allocated under the federal legislation is not likely to cover every eligible business. There may well be subsequent legislation in Washington but for now that is the limit. Final guidance on the PPP must still be issued by the Treasury Department. That should be forthcoming very shortly and once that guidance is issued commercial banks and community banks will be able to make these loans which will turn into grants per the conditions already listed. Small business owners should contact their banks as soon as possible. New Hampshire Bankers have made it very clear that they will do everything in their power to assist small businesses through this very trying time. Banks will need to verify a business’s payroll records for loans to be turned into grants. While the PPP will go through commercial and community banks, Economic Injury Disaster Loans will continue to be administered by the Small Business Association which can be reached at tel:800-659-2955 or . It should also be noted that Governor Sununu has allowed for deferred tax payments for anyone subject to the Business Profits Tax, Business Enterprise Tax and Interest and Dividends Tax. That deferral will extend to June 15th2020 and will apply to the I&D; tax up to $10,000 owed and the combined BET/BPT taxes up to $50,000 owed. Another key provision in the federal legislation is an expansion of unemployment benefits. According to a summary published by Kevin Brady of the U.S. House Ways and Means Committee, $250 billion has been appropriated to enhance traditional unemployment benefits. The maximum unemployment benefit in New Hampshire is $427. Governor Sununu has already allowed benefits to be paid without a one week wait time and also announced the minimum benefit will increase from $32 per week to $168. New Hampshire residents who have lost their job due to the virus are eligible for unemployment if an employer has closed or reduced employees, if someone is self-quarantined or family members are in quarantine, or if school closures force parents to care for their children. People who are self-employed and who cannot operate their business temporarily due to these conditions are also eligible for unemployment benefits. If someone’s hours have been reduced, they too are eligible for unemployment. Unemployment benefits in New Hampshire can be applied for at the Department of Employment Security . Use the red box on the homepage but also due to high volume of filing apply per the guidelines right next to the red box. Employment Security can also be reached by phone at 271-7700. In addition to New Hampshire unemployment benefits, the federal legislation allows for a 4-month temporary $600 weekly payment on top of the New Hampshire benefit. This temporary benefit will extend to July 31. The new federal law also allows for an extra 13 weeks of compensation for those who experience longer term unemployment. These economic measures are unprecedented, but so too is the threat to hard working New Hampshire residents and small businesses which is why these measures are so necessary. Along with ramping up virus testing, providing more protective equipment and enhancing medical response capabilities we will get through this crisis despite the terrible human toll the virus is causing. Most importantly, Thank You to the many health care providers, pharmacy employees, grocery store employees and many many other New Hampshire people who have stepped up to confront the virus and protect their fellow citizens. As always, please reach out to me with questions at tel:603-387-2365. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Jeb Bradley Chairman | | | NH Senate Republicans PAC | | P.O. Box 30, Concord NH 03301 United States | You received this email because you signed up on our website or at an event.

clean_body: We are literal hours away from the FEC deadline at midnight, and we are so, so close to our goal. Charles here. I know it's late, so I'll be quick. We are less than 4 hours away from the FEC deadline at midnight, and we are so, so close to our goal. But we just aren't quite there yet! Unfortunately, we're still hovering somewhere around 98% to goal. = **= I'll be real with you. Our campaign has always been an uphill battle. Taking on the Democratic establishment, much less Mitch McConnell, is no small task. But the support we've already received has been so inspiring, and I know our movement is ready for this fight. And you can see for yourself above: we're so incredibly close to meeting our goal. But if we don't finish the job in the next couple of hours, it would be a huge blow to all of the progress we've made. = = Thank you, Charles \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Colin Lauderdale, Campaign Manager Date: Tue, Mar 31, 2020 Subject: $400 To: dpwillis67@gmail.com We're getting closer to the FEC deadline at midnight tonight -- but we wanted to take a quick second to share how we're doing up against our $20,000 goal. In short? We're just TWO percent away from reaching our goal. = Some quick math: two percent of $20,000 is $400. And while that may seem like a large amount of money, I know we can easily raise that if everyone pitches in whatever spare change they have. = = Many will be watching tonight to see if our campaign hits this goal -- the media, the establishment, and our opponents. We've always said that our campaign's strength lies with you, our supporters, and in the progressive, people-first values that we champion. Peter, **I know this is a tough time for everyone.** Some of us are out of work. Others are homebound with disruptions to our lives, plans and goals. But this campaign still has a huge goal we are working towards — restoring representation to this district. Our team—myself, five staff, and a crew of dedicated volunteers and supporters—is working at full steam. We are implementing new voter contact tools and making thousands of phone calls. Most importantly, we are assisting a range of community groups that are feeding, housing, and helping individuals who have been directly impacted by the coronavirus crisis. **The month of March has felt like a lifetime—the primary vote was March 3rd!—but today is the final day of March, and the end of this public reporting period.** Our work may sometimes feel insignificant, but at the core we are fighting for democracy and representation — essential work that takes resources. **[If you are able, please contribute to our campaign so we can continue this important work. Our aim is to retire a Member of Congress who cares more about passing blame to China than holding his own president accountable. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16742318/178116623/203122784?refcode=em033120&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTcxN2Q2Zi1iMjczLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ajov-vDxn_VQFFRmHDCS_T3M67WNqqbc6qVx_qmZY9E=)** Let’s come out of this crisis with a renewed sense of the changes we must make in this country, and get closer to the ideal of liberty and justice for all. Mike Siegel

name: Greg Pence
subject: re: resources for COVID-19
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress |
body:
Together, we will get through this. Friend,

Last week, I drove from Columbus to Washington, DC to ensure the people of the Sixth District had their voice represented in Congress during this uncertain time. I voted to pass the CARES Act that provides $2.2 Trillion to combat the Coronavirus pandemic because I believe Congress has to do everything we can to ensure our country and states have the resources they need to mitigate the spread of this global virus. The health and prosperity of the American people is priority.

The bill was not perfect, but in this time of uncertainty, it is important to not let the perfect be the enemy of the good.
Now that Congress has passed the third phase of the Coronavirus package, we must make sure our constituents have access to information they need in order to access this funding stream.
That's why I wanted to reach out to you with the resources YOU need to get you through the COVID-19 crisis:

And don't forget the most important way to prevent the virus is to practice these common sense, CDC recommendations:

* _Avoid close contact by putting distance between yourself and other people, particularly with people who are sick._
* _Clean your hands often with soap and water, or a hand sanitizer that contains at least 60% alcohol._
* _Avoid touching your eyes, nose, and mouth._
* _Stay home when you are sick._
* _Cover your cough or sneeze with a tissue, then throw the tissue in the trash._
* _Clean and disinfect frequently touched objects and surfaces using a regular household cleaning spray or wipe._

Friend, there's no doubt about it: this is a serious issue in our country, but we are making progress.
**I will continue my prayers for this country, and for every Hoosier.**
Together, we will get through this. -Greg Pence | |

An individual may not contribute more than a total of $2,800 (maximum for Primary Election) per election to the committee. Federal law prohibits contributions to the committee from the general treasury funds of a corporation, labor organizations or national banks (including corporate or other business entity credit cards), from any person contributing another’s funds, from a Federal government contractor, or from a foreign national who lacks permanent resident status.
clean_body: Together, we will get through this. Friend, Last week, I drove from Columbus to Washington, DC to ensure the people of the Sixth District had their voice represented in Congress during this uncertain time. I voted to pass the CARES Act that provides $2.2 Trillion to combat the Coronavirus pandemic because I believe Congress has to do everything we can to ensure our country and states have the resources they need to mitigate the spread of this global virus. The health and prosperity of the American people is priority. The bill was not perfect, but in this time of uncertainty, it is important to not let the perfect be the enemy of the good. Now that Congress has passed the third phase of the Coronavirus package, we must make sure our constituents have access to information they need in order to access this funding stream. That's why I wanted to reach out to you with the resources YOU need to get you through the COVID-19 crisis: Here's Governor Holcomb's steps to slow the spread of this virus. If you want to stay 100% up-to-date on the status of the Coronavirus in our state You can here. Clean your hands often with soap and water, or a hand sanitizer that contains at least 60% alcohol. Avoid touching your eyes, nose, and mouth. Stay home when you are sick. Cover your cough or sneeze with a tissue, then throw the tissue in the trash. Clean and disinfect frequently touched objects and surfaces using a regular household cleaning spray or wipe. Friend, there's no doubt about it: this is a serious issue in our country, but we are making progress. I will continue my prayers for this country, and for every Hoosier.
