name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Feeding people in need during COVID-19
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
Millions of
people suddenly find themselves out of work, unable to make ends meet.
Many are depending on food banks to feed themselves and their families.

These food banks, already stretched thin under normal circumstances, are
at risk of being unable to meet this unprecedented demand. They need our
help.

That’s why on the last day of this quarter, instead of fundraising for
campaigns and political ends, I’m asking you to join our fundraising drive
for food banks.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42415?refcode=ema20200331-83736&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=83736%2E444211%2EHWyS6s ]Please split a contribution between Feeding Texas and Feeding America
to immediately help food banks feed people in need during the COVID-19
crisis.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42415?refcode=ema20200331-83736&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=83736%2E444211%2EHWyS6s ]Contribute $3

The surge in demand is pushing many food banks beyond their capacity to
purchase food for their service region. Smaller food banks are forced to
bid against larger ones for limited supplies of food, and some don’t have
the resources to get their fair share. That’s why they need our help.

If you can’t afford to give at this time, please don’t worry. If you can,
our food banks need you now.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42415?refcode=ema20200331-83736&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=83736%2E444211%2EHWyS6s ]Every donation on this page will go directly to help food banks in
Texas and across America feed people in need. Please contribute here.

I’m proud of everyone that’s stepped up to respond to this request.
Please, if you can, join your fellow Americans in donating to this urgent
need.

Thank you,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=83736%2E444211%2EHWyS6s

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

[ ]Please split a contribution between Feeding Texas and Feeding America to immediately help food banks feed people in need during the COVID-19 crisis. name: Team Tina
subject: moving everything online
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
_This is a difficult time for many — so please, only donate if you can afford to do so. Just knowing you opened this message means a lot to Tina and the rest of our team. Stay safe and take care of your loved ones._
* * *
Friend — Thank you for staying in contact with our campaign during this unprecedented time. We appreciate your support more than you know, especially right now. Here’s why: At midnight tonight, we will be closing the books on our very first FEC fundraising deadline of the year. That is when we will report exactly how many individual donors pitched in to our campaign and how much we raised. **Those numbers will be made public for everyone to see, including our opponent, Mitch McConnell, and yes, Donald Trump himself.** But our top priority is to keep our staff and supporters safe. That’s why our campaign is developing a new strategy to keep up with our ambitious goals by moving all of our fundraising online. It’s the right thing to do. We understand how difficult it can be to donate right now, and we know you probably have a lot on your mind. But we’re asking you to chip in any amount you can afford before midnight — _only_ if you are able. **The first FEC deadline of the year is at midnight — so if it makes sense for you financially, add a donation of any amount meaningful to you and get your name on our Q1 report. Please, only consider chipping in if you can afford it. Stay safe and healthy. — Team Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: VIDEO OF THE DAY: America is winning together
body:
Together, America has mounted a full-scale response to the pandemic. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b130e33e3d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • March 31, 2020
---
| | |
# **🎬****VIDEO OF THE DAY: America is winning together**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a361f29095&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **President Trump** didn’t wait to take action on Coronavirus, from imposing swift travel restrictions on China to organizing a White House Task Force in January.

**These early moves** —which at the time drew criticism from some in Washington as an “overreaction”—have allowed America to slow the spread of the deadly virus today.

**🇺🇸** [“Every one of us has a role to play in winning this war.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c1e09458be&e=3ee4985eea)

**Together, America** has mounted a full-scale response to the pandemic. In the Rose Garden yesterday, a number of CEOs joined the President to explain how they’ve transformed their own companies to help fight the virus:
* **Honeywell** is multiplying its [production of N95 masks](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=705614cc17&e=3ee4985eea) several times over.
* **Jockey** plans to deliver [30,000 to 50,000 hospital gowns](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=164fd981e2&e=3ee4985eea) per week.
* **United Technologies** donated 90,000 pieces of personal protective equipment to FEMA last week–with [1 million more on the way](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a61a03b769&e=3ee4985eea).

**As great American businesses** step up, citizens across the country are doing their part to slow the spread, too. “The choices and sacrifices we make will determine the fate of this virus and, really, the fate of our victory,” President Trump says.

[READ: “What we at the FDA are doing to fight Covid-19”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d83e0bbfb0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
# **POLL: Americans want better from their news media**

**A majority of Americans** —60 percent, [according to Gallup](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=56a93421ff&e=3ee4985eea)—support the President’s response to the Coronavirus pandemic. A slightly smaller majority, 59 percent, approve of Congress’ handling of the crisis. The poll was conducted before President Trump signed the bipartisan CARES Act, which is supported by 77 percent of U.S. adults.

**In fact** , nearly all of the institutions surveyed by Gallup earned high marks from the public. Americans approve of the efforts by hospitals, state governments, schools, daycares, Federal agencies, and employers to confront the global outbreak together.

**There was one exception:** the news media. A majority of Americans, 55 percent, disapprove of how the media has handled the Coronavirus response.

**Facts and results** matter, especially during a crisis. Leaders across the country are putting politics aside to get to work. President Trump and Congress have joined forces on several major emergency-relief bills. Governors are implementing crucial public safety measures. Businesses are repurposing factories to make more masks and other medical supplies available.

**Many in the media,** however, continue to put ratings before country. Last month, _Politico_ and others [spread the false story](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b808d3fa10&e=3ee4985eea) that President Trump called the Coronavirus “a hoax.” This misinformation came after the Administration had already taken crucial steps to combat the pandemic, including travel restrictions on China in January.

**Other pundits** have actively rooted for the American response to fail. “On Friday March 20, [MSNBC’s Rachel Maddow said](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4cee034f11&e=3ee4985eea) President Trump was lying when he said the U.S. Navy hospital ships would arrive in Los Angeles and New York City in the near future” to help treat patients, Chrissy Clark wrote for _The Federalist_ yesterday.

**“Exactly a week later** , the USNS Mercy arrived in the Port of Los Angeles.” And yesterday, the USNS Comfort docked at Pier 90 in New York City.

**Washington pundits** and reporters must start listening to the American public more and to each other less. As the country fights this Coronavirus together, timely and trustworthy information is essential. The news media should prioritize facts and constructive debate—not obsessive attacks on this President based on false narratives.

**Americans have had enough,** and they’ve said so clearly. It’s time to hear them.
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **Dr. Stephen Hahn, Commissioner of the Food and Drug Administration, delivers remarks during a Coronavirus briefing in the Rose Garden** | March 30, 2020
---
|

---

---

Now more than ever, our country needs leaders who put people first.

That's one of the reasons why we launched Warren Democrats: a movement to support candidates like Elizabeth who are fighting for bold, inclusive reform that roots out corruption in our government and puts power in the hands of the people.

Our first fundraising deadline is tonight. The early investments we can make now will make a huge difference in our work to elect Democrats up and down the ballot this November and support Elizabeth Warren's vision in the future.

**[If it makes sense for your budget right now, can you pitch in $2 or anything you can before our first fundraising deadline at midnight?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525797/45c30650/1f70bb525/66e97ef5/3434560723/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdhcnJlbmRlbW9jcmF0cy1tYXJjaDIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUDM1Rl9FT1FfR1JNX0NfMjAyMDAzMzFfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-warrendemocrats-march20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMP35F_EOQ_GRM_C_20200331_V1S2_P")**

Even though she is no longer running for president, Elizabeth is not done fighting for working people from the Senate.

Because as we work to solve the coronavirus pandemic and the economic crisis ahead, we need leaders who fight for workers, not corporations. We need leaders who aren't afraid to call out that our economy rigged against working people, and who fight for policies like universal health care and paid leave for all.

**Your contribution before our first deadline tonight will help ensure that Elizabeth -- and the candidates who share her vision -- remain in this fight for years to come.**

**[If you're able to, please make a contribution before our first deadline at midnight to help lay the foundation for our movement's success.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525797/45c30650/1f70bb525/66e97ef5/3434560723/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdhcnJlbmRlbW9jcmF0cy1tYXJjaDIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUDM1Rl9FT1FfR1JNX0NfMjAyMDAzMzFfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-warrendemocrats-march20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMP35F_EOQ_GRM_C_20200331_V1S2_P")**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: After Coronavirus, what will America Look like?
body:
We’re just a few hours away from the end of the fundraising quarter
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-370220-869497-4935285-0f49943586-0e9efc7b97)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-370220-869497-4935284-4c6bfad944-0e9efc7b97) We’re just a few hours away from the end of the fundraising quarter.

We have until midnight to raise [just a few thousand more dollars, and I need your help](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-370220-869497-4935284-4c6bfad944-0e9efc7b97).

**I know we’re all stressed out about the Coronavirus.**

While many of us are sheltered at home, uncertainty is overwhelming us.

But my fear isn’t what will happen today or next week, **we have no control over that**.

**My fear is what will happen in January of next year when a new Congress is sworn in.**

Democrats are ALREADY exploiting this worldwide crisis to move their socialist agenda forward.

You know this, but I’ll say it again, Democrats want Americans DEPENDENT on Government.

They want COMPLETE CONTROL and the best way to achieve that is to have as many individuals and families totally reliant on government.

And they are using COVID-19 to scare Americans straight to the chains of Democrat dependency!

Will America swing to the left and embrace the false comfort of socialism that Democrats swear will protect them, or will we break free and maintain the course of Liberty?

It’s a very real question and while I know where you stand, [**we will have to fight harder than ever to silence the siren’s song of socialism as our nation panics**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-370220-869497-4935284-4c6bfad944-0e9efc7b97).

This is why I am running for Congress. I am now more determined than I have ever been before to make sure that America doesn't succumb to socialism. We need to do everything in our power to ensure Congress has leaders who will always fight to procect our God-given rights as outlined in the United States Constitution. I am your fighter.

[Help me do that today by making one last donation before midnight tonight.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-370220-869497-4935284-4c6bfad944-0e9efc7b97)

We’ll keep the Republic, but we’ll have to fight for it and now is the time to do it.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-370220-869497-84585d41bbe610b-0e9efc7b97)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bret=20Richards?=
subject: Not. Another. Fundraising. Email.
body:
In this uncertain time, I don't think it's right to ask for your money. Your neighbors, friends, and family need your support more.

http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=a7a3bc0d61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-a7a3bc0d61-25822489
https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=a7a3bc0d61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-a7a3bc0d61-25822489
https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=a7a3bc0d61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-a7a3bc0d61-25822489
https://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=a7a3bc0d61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-a7a3bc0d61-25822489
https://www.instagram.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=a7a3bc0d61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-a7a3bc0d61-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCWoK8_dK_O4JOjCtLkZKF9w?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=a7a3bc0d61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-a7a3bc0d61-25822489
http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=a7a3bc0d61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-a7a3bc0d61-25822489
Hello

I hope this finds everyone healthy and safe. We live in extraordinary times, don’t we?

You're probably thinking: "Oh, no. Not another candidate in my inbox asking for money."

Well, I'm not gonna do that. I think in a time like this, it's best to put politics aside and put the lives of our neighbors, friends, and fellow Iowans first. Truck drivers, waitresses, farmers, cashiers, plant managers, and every other essential Iowan is worried that this paycheck could be the last one for a while.

Unlike career politicians who keep asking for more money so they can run TV commercials full of empty promises (https://twitter.com/RandyFeenstra/status/1245122751096070147?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=a7a3bc0d61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-a7a3bc0d61-25822489) , I'm going to ask THREE things of you:

#1 is likely to be the toughest. Like you, I was raised with an Iowa work ethic
—we want to work. That’s why being told to stay home is hard for you and me to accept. It's hard for me and my campaign volunteers to not be out knocking on thousands of doors. But this pandemic needs to be taken seriously so please follow the guidance of Governor Reynolds and stay home when you can.

#2 will be the easiest for you because you already put others ahead of yourself. How do I know that about you? Being from Iowa, we were raised with similar family values. I was raised to help others when I can. I, we, our country will need you to help others in the coming days. The first place to turn shouldn't be the government; let's help each other out first. Will you donate blood, call a neighbor to check in, or help someone in a high risk category get groceries? If you know of someone in need don’t hesitate to reach out to me, we will activate our network in your area and find someone who can help. You tell me how our volunteers can best help you and others. Right now, it's about putting others first.

#3 as time permits, I do need your help getting signs out across the district and getting people to vote. Please help us find high traffic locations for our 4'x8' signs and request us to send information cards to your home.

We're still headed to victory on June 2, we just have a few things our neighbors need help getting done first. Right now, we all need to focus on our family, friends, and our country.
GET IN TOUCH WITH OUR NETWORK (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=a7a3bc0d61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-a7a3bc0d61-25822489)
LIKE US ON FACEBOOK (http://facebook.com/bretrichards4congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=a7a3bc0d61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-a7a3bc0d61-25822489)
PUT UP A SIGN (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=a7a3bc0d61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-a7a3bc0d61-25822489)
As always, get in touch with me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712) 579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

I appreciate your continued support.

Your neighbor,
P.S. Donating blood is especially important to me because two years ago, my wife Jill had transfusions of over 14 units of blood that saved her life. Find a Red Cross Blood Drive here (redcrossblood.org/give.html/find-drive (https://www.redcrossblood.org/give.html/find-drive?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=a7a3bc0d61-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-a7a3bc0d61-25822489) )

============================================================
Copyright © 2019 Richards For Congress, All rights reserved.
You signed up to receive this message at an event, on Facebook, or through our website.

Bret Richards is a former member of the United States Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

Our mailing address is:
Richards For Congress
P.O. Box 293
Irwin, Iowa 51446-0293

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can ** update your preferences (https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=7d99180ded&e=3cee88c8ab)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=7d99180ded&e=3cee88c8ab&c=a7a3bc0d61)
.

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Whatever you're doing, you're in the game
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Again, as always, the best thing you can do to help us get through this faster and safer is stay home | | |
---|---|---
Friend,

**_“Whatever you’re doing, you’re in the game and playing an MVP role.”_**

Governor Holcomb gave an update on Indiana’s fight against COVID-19 and reminded us that all Hoosiers are playing a critical role in slowing the spread, flattening the curve and keeping ourselves, and each other, safe and healthy.

It really spans the gamut:

* _From the**Central Indiana Sewing Club** that’s making masks for medical personnel—and has seen its membership soar from 700 to over 4,000 in the last few days...to the businesses and individuals in southwest Indiana that have already contributed $2.2 million to **a new COVID-19 crisis fund,** created to aid Hoosiers who are temporarily out of work._
* _From**American Ultraviolet** in Lebanon, making UV sanitation equipment...**to the long-term care facilities rapidly developing COVID-19 only units.**_

We’re seeing Indiana come together, adapt, and evolve like never before to mitigate the impact of this pandemic. As the governor said, _**“Nothing is out of our grasp when we're well coordinated, well conducted and working toward that common goal."**_

Additionally, the governor gave us an update on the call for additional medical personnel to volunteer to combat COVID-19. Yesterday, Gov. Holcomb signed an executive order allowing retired medical professionals and some medical and nursing students to join in the fight. Yesterday afternoon, 5,300 Hoosiers volunteered. **Today that number is well over 11,000** —not including medical and nursing students. These medical professionals will backfill areas where personnel is stretched thin as the COVID-19 surge sets in.

The governor also signed additional executive orders today, further shielding Indiana from the expected coronavirus surge. The executive orders:
* Extend the carry-out only status of Indiana bars and restaurants through April 6, 2020.
* Waive statutes to allow e-notary rules to take effect.

Again, as always, the best thing you can do to help us get through this faster and safer is stay home. If you won’t do it for yourself, do it for your loved ones. For your neighbors. For your parents and grandparents. For all those people in your life who may be at risk. Staying home will save lives.

Sincerely,
-Your Holcomb Crew
---
---
|
|
| |
---
| Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. |
| Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 |
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

|
| [Unsubscribe](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_s=6e8d3ee5087946bdbfae4482f7b6bccd&_t=iwUB6us20BHPHLhSXYIDxi709D_YCDs_WlclM0WXU-wlaLDgWlOt5agbjRFdOlH1hB5iAoDdVBWSIPQBWReqvqY22oGligD9VJZw4UfYdOBMjbT7p93-3OxnZeJ_2lmlaMphA0V5CZ7tembhXfO-dkriHh6kCcMuDr_cJs0_JTA%3D) |

Today that number is well over 11,000 —not including medical and nursing students. These medical professionals will backfill areas where personnel is stretched thin as the COVID-19 surge sets in. The governor also signed additional executive orders today, further shielding Indiana from the expected coronavirus surge. The executive orders: Extend the carry-out only status of Indiana bars and restaurants through April 6, 2020. Waive statutes to allow e-notary rules to take effect. Again, as always, the best thing you can do to help us get through this faster and safer is stay home. If you won’t do it for yourself, do it for your loved ones. For your neighbors. For your parents and grandparents. For all those people in your life who may be at risk. Staying home will save lives. Sincerely, -Your Holcomb Crew | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

body:
Control of the U.S. Senate is on the line.
| | |

I'll be honest, friend: I need your help.
We're only a few hours away from the first official FEC deadline of our campaign, and I just got some bad news from my team:** If donations don't pick up right away, we're on track to fall short of our match goal. **
Make no mistake: Control of the U.S. Senate is on the line in this race. With my Republican opponent spending millions of her personal fortune to buy this seat and strengthen Mitch McConnell's grip on power, **the _only_ way we'll be able to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate is if grassroots folks like you pitch in - but time is almost up for you to have your gift matched. **
**Friend, I wouldn't ask if it weren't important: ****[Will you please give $5 or more right now- as much as you can spare - to have your donation go twice as far to make up this shortfall, flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk92-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
This is the biggest test we've faced so far. And if we fail, we'll lose the best chance we've got at ending Mitch McConnell's Senate majority once and for all.
That's why this match offer is so important. To flip Georgia blue and fight back against every last right-wing attack, we need to close this fundraising gap by midnight tonight - and this match is the way we do it.
**I'm counting on you to chip in right now, ****friend: [Please, if you care about taking back the Senate for Democrats, will you give $5 or more - $5 becomes $10 - to help us hit our critical $50,000 match goal and flip Georgia blue?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk92-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
Thanks for standing alongside me in this fight.

Reverend Warnock
